    const newScale=Math.max(0.1,Math.min(4,_vpScale*factor));
    _vpX+=mx*(_vpScale-newScale);
    _vpY+=my*(_vpScale-newScale);
    _vpScale=newScale;
    applyViewport();
  },{passive:false});
  // Drag to pan
  wrap.addEventListener("mousedown",e=>{
    if(e.button!==0) return;
    _isDragging=true;
    _dragStartX=e.clientX; _dragStartY=e.clientY;
    _dragVpX=_vpX; _dragVpY=_vpY;
    wrap.style.cursor="grabbing";
    e.preventDefault();
  });
  document.addEventListener("mousemove",e=>{
    if(!_isDragging) return;
    _vpX=_dragVpX+(e.clientX-_dragStartX);
    _vpY=_dragVpY+(e.clientY-_dragStartY);
    applyViewport();
  });
  document.addEventListener("mouseup",()=>{
    if(!_isDragging) return;
    _isDragging=false;
    const w=document.getElementById("c4-canvas-wrap");
    if(w) w.style.cursor="grab";
  });
}

function topProdOf(pid){ const p=byId[pid]; return (p&&p.parent)?topProdOf(p.parent):pid; }

function renderC4Context(cfg, selList, content){
  const selModIds = new Set(selList.map(m=>m.id));
  const showOut = (c4DepDir !== "in");
  const showIn  = (c4DepDir !== "out");

  // Internal: top-level products of selected modules (only those with active components)
  const internalSet = new Set();
  selList.forEach(m=>{ if(m.product && countActiveCompsInProd(m.id)>0) internalSet.add(topProdOf(m.product)); });

  // Collect ALL dep types per product-pair (keep sync and async separately)
  const prodPairData = {}; // "sp||tp" → {sp,tp,syncDeps:[],asyncDeps:[]}
  function _addProdPair(sp, tp, d){
    const key=`${sp}||${tp}`;
    if(!prodPairData[key]) prodPairData[key]={sp,tp,syncDeps:[],asyncDeps:[]};
    const sc2=byId[d.from], tc2=byId[d.to];
    const isKafka=(d.callType||"").startsWith("kafka")||(d.proto||"").toLowerCase().includes("kafka")||sc2?.role==="evl"||tc2?.role==="evl";
    const entry={proto:d.proto||"",callType:d.callType||(isKafka?"kafka-consume":"https-rest"),topicName:d.topicName||"",schemaName:d.schemaName||"",headerSchema:d.headerSchema||"",payloadSchema:d.payloadSchema||"",direction:d.direction||"",purpose:d.purpose||"",security:d.security||"",compFrom:d.from||"",compTo:d.to||""};
    if(isKafka) prodPairData[key].asyncDeps.push(entry);
    else        prodPairData[key].syncDeps.push(entry);
  }
  if(showOut) DATA.deps.forEach(d=>{
    const sc=byId[d.from], tc=byId[d.to]; if(!sc||!tc) return;
    const sp=topProdOf(sc.product||""), tp=topProdOf(tc.product||"");
    if(!sp||!tp||sp===tp) return;
    if(!internalSet.has(sp)||!selModIds.has(sc.module)) return;
    _addProdPair(sp, tp, d);
  });
  if(showIn) DATA.deps.forEach(d=>{
    const sc=byId[d.from], tc=byId[d.to]; if(!sc||!tc) return;
    const sp=topProdOf(sc.product||""), tp=topProdOf(tc.product||"");
    if(!sp||!tp||sp===tp) return;
    if(internalSet.has(sp)||!internalSet.has(tp)) return;
    if(!selModIds.has(tc.module)) return;
    _addProdPair(sp, tp, d);
  });

  // External products
  const externalSet = new Set();
  Object.values(prodPairData).forEach(pd=>{
    if(!internalSet.has(pd.tp)) externalSet.add(pd.tp);
    if(!internalSet.has(pd.sp)) externalSet.add(pd.sp);
  });

  if(!c4ShowFnd){
    [...externalSet].forEach(pid=>{
      if((byId[pid]?.code||"").toLowerCase().startsWith("fnd")) externalSet.delete(pid);
    });
    Object.keys(prodPairData).forEach(k=>{
      const pd=prodPairData[k];
      const tpCode=(byId[pd.tp]?.code||"").toLowerCase();
      const spCode=(byId[pd.sp]?.code||"").toLowerCase();
      if(tpCode.startsWith("fnd")||spCode.startsWith("fnd")) delete prodPairData[k];
    });
  }

  // ── Universal foundation deps at L1: add FND product as dependency of all non-FND products ──
  let _fndProdL1=null;
  if(showOut && c4ShowFnd && (DATA.universalModDeps||[]).length){
    _fndProdL1=DATA.products.find(p=>p.code==="fnd")||null;
    const hasNonFnd=[...internalSet].some(pid=>!(byId[pid]?.code||"").startsWith("fnd"));
    if(_fndProdL1 && hasNonFnd && !internalSet.has(_fndProdL1.id)){
      externalSet.add(_fndProdL1.id);
    }
  }

  // ── L1: nascondi prodotti interni senza connessioni nella vista corrente ──
  {
    const _connSps=new Set(Object.values(prodPairData).map(pd=>pd.sp));
    // Preserva prodotti con FND universal deps (showOut + c4ShowFnd)
    if(_fndProdL1 && c4ShowFnd && showOut){
      [...internalSet].forEach(id=>{ if(!(byId[id]?.code||"").startsWith("fnd")) _connSps.add(id); });
    }
    [...internalSet].forEach(id=>{ if(!_connSps.has(id)) internalSet.delete(id); });
    // Rimuovi anche le external entries che non sono più collegate a nessun interno
    Object.keys(prodPairData).forEach(k=>{
      if(!internalSet.has(prodPairData[k].sp)) delete prodPairData[k];
    });
    [...externalSet].forEach(id=>{
      if(id===(_fndProdL1?.id)) return; // mantieni FND universal
      if(!Object.values(prodPairData).some(pd=>pd.tp===id)) externalSet.delete(id);
    });
  }

  const wrap=document.createElement("div");
  wrap.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:row;gap:450px;align-items:center;padding:20px 60px;min-width:fit-content";
  content.appendChild(wrap);

  // ── Internal column (left) ──
  const intCol=document.createElement("div");
  intCol.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;flex-shrink:0";
  wrap.appendChild(intCol);
  const intHdr=document.createElement("div");
  intHdr.innerHTML=`<div class="c4-section-hdr"><span class="c4-int-dot"></span>Selected Products</div>`;
  intCol.appendChild(intHdr);
  const intGrid=document.createElement("div");
  intGrid.id="c4-context-grid";
  intGrid.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:60px";
  intCol.appendChild(intGrid);
  [...internalSet].map(id=>byId[id]).filter(Boolean)
    .sort((a,b)=>a.label.localeCompare(b.label))
    .forEach(prod=>intGrid.appendChild(makeC4SystemBox(prod, false, selList)));

  // ── External column (right) ──
  if(externalSet.size>0){
    const extLabel = c4DepDir==="out" ? "🔽 Depends on — Product Dependencies"
                   : c4DepDir==="in"  ? "🔼 Is dependency of — Product Dependencies"
                   : "Product Dependencies";
    const extCol=document.createElement("div");
    extCol.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;flex-shrink:0;padding-left:16px;border-left:1px dashed var(--border)";
    wrap.appendChild(extCol);
    const extHdr=document.createElement("div");
    extHdr.innerHTML=`<div class="c4-section-hdr"><span class="c4-ext-dot"></span>${extLabel}</div>`;
    extCol.appendChild(extHdr);
    const extGrid=document.createElement("div");
    extGrid.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:60px";
    extCol.appendChild(extGrid);
    [...externalSet].map(id=>byId[id]).filter(Boolean)
      .sort((a,b)=>a.label.localeCompare(b.label))
      .forEach(prod=>extGrid.appendChild(makeC4SystemBox(prod, true, [])));
  }

  // Build unified enriched deps map for arrows with sync/async/mixed coloring
  const allDeps={};
  function _splitCamelL1(s, max){
    if(!s) return "";
    const sp2=s.replace(/([a-z])([A-Z])/g,"$1 $2").replace(/([A-Z]+)([A-Z][a-z])/g,"$1 $2");
    if(sp2.length<=(max||18)) return sp2;
    const ws=sp2.split(" "); let r="";
    for(const w of ws){ if(!r){r=w;continue;} if((r+" "+w).length<=(max||18)-1) r+=" "+w; else{r+="…";break;} }
    return r;
  }
  Object.values(prodPairData).forEach(({sp,tp,syncDeps,asyncDeps})=>{
    const hasSyncDeps=syncDeps.length>0, hasAsyncDeps=asyncDeps.length>0;
    // Collect unique entities with direction icons
    const allEntities=[];
    const seenEnt=new Set();
    asyncDeps.forEach(dep=>{
      let eName=dep.payloadSchema||dep.schemaName||"";
      eName=eName.replace(/TopicMessage$/,"").replace(/Message$/,"").replace(/Event$/,"");
      if(!eName&&dep.topicName){const segs=dep.topicName.split("-");eName=segs.length>=2?segs.slice(-2).join("-"):segs[segs.length-1];}
      if(eName&&!seenEnt.has(eName)){seenEnt.add(eName);const d2=(dep.direction||"").toUpperCase();const ic=d2==="PRODUCE"||d2==="OUT"?"↑":d2==="CONSUME"||d2==="IN"?"↓":"⇅";allEntities.push({name:eName,icon:ic,proto:"kafka"});}
    });
    syncDeps.forEach(dep=>{
      const tc2=byId[dep.compTo];const ck=((tc2?.htmlKey||tc2?.code)||"").toLowerCase();
      const cm=(DATA.compMeta||{})[ck];const ep=(cm?.endpoints||[]).find(e=>e.resp);
      const eName=ep?.resp?.replace("[]","");
      if(eName&&!seenEnt.has(eName)){seenEnt.add(eName);allEntities.push({name:eName,icon:"→",proto:"rest"});}
    });
    // Color: blue=sync-only, fuchsia=async-only, amber=both
    let l1CT=hasSyncDeps&&hasAsyncDeps?"mixed":hasAsyncDeps?"kafka-consume":"https-rest";
    const bestDep=asyncDeps[0]||syncDeps[0];
    const entry={...bestDep,to:tp,callType:l1CT,_l1:true,_allEntities:allEntities,_hasSyncDeps:hasSyncDeps,_hasAsyncDeps:hasAsyncDeps};
    if(!allDeps[sp]) allDeps[sp]=[];
    if(!allDeps[sp].find(x=>x.to===tp)) allDeps[sp].push(entry);
  });

  // ── Inject universal FND arrows into allDeps (after allDeps is built) ──
  if(_fndProdL1){
    const entitiesAll=[...(new Set((DATA.universalModDeps||[]).flatMap(ud=>ud.entities||[])))];
    [...internalSet].forEach(sp=>{
      if((byId[sp]?.code||"").startsWith("fnd")) return;
      if(!allDeps[sp]) allDeps[sp]=[];
      if(!allDeps[sp].find(x=>x.to===_fndProdL1.id)){
        allDeps[sp].push({to:_fndProdL1.id,proto:"rest",callType:"https-rest",
          topicName:"",schemaName:"",headerSchema:"",payloadSchema:"",direction:"",
          purpose:(DATA.universalModDeps||[]).map(ud=>ud.purpose).join("; "),
          security:"",compFrom:"",compTo:"",_l1:true,
          _allEntities:entitiesAll.map(e=>({name:e,icon:"→",proto:"rest"})),
          _hasSyncDeps:true,_hasAsyncDeps:false,_universal:true});
      }
    });
  }

  requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
    // Equalize all product box widths and heights (like L2 modules)
    const _allSysBoxes=[...content.querySelectorAll('.c4-system-box')];
    if(_allSysBoxes.length>1){
      const _maxW=Math.max(..._allSysBoxes.map(b=>b.getBoundingClientRect().width));
      const _w=Math.ceil(_maxW)+'px';
      _allSysBoxes.forEach(b=>{b.style.width=_w;b.style.minWidth=_w;b.style.maxWidth=_w;});
      const _maxH=Math.max(..._allSysBoxes.map(b=>b.getBoundingClientRect().height));
      const _h=Math.ceil(_maxH)+'px';
      _allSysBoxes.forEach(b=>{b.style.height=_h;b.style.minHeight=_h;});
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(()=>drawC4Arrows(allDeps, cfg, ".c4-system-box"));
  });
  // ── Diagram counters L1 ──
  updateDiagramCounts(internalSet.size + externalSet.size, 0, 0);
}

function makeC4SystemBox(prod, isExternal, selList){
  const [acc]=isExternal?["#6e7681"]:getColor(prod.id);
  const mods=selList.filter(m=>topProdOf(m.product||"")===prod.id);
  const totalComps=mods.reduce((s,m)=>s+countActiveCompsInProd(m.id),0);
  const shortDesc=prod.label.replace(/^[A-Z]+-/,"").trim();
  const box=document.createElement("div");
  box.className="c4-system-box"+(isExternal?" external":"");
  box.dataset.id=prod.id;
  box.style.borderColor=acc;
  box.style.background=acc+"20";
  box.innerHTML=`
    <div class="c4-tag">${isExternal?"[Product Dependency]":"[Product]"}</div>
    <div class="c4-name" style="color:${acc}">${prod.code.toUpperCase()} — ${shortDesc}</div>
    ${!isExternal?`<div class="c4-footer"><span>📦 ${mods.length} mod.</span><span>⚙ ${totalComps} comp.</span></div>`:''}`;
  box.addEventListener("click",   e=>{ e.stopPropagation(); showProductDetail(prod.id); });
  box.addEventListener("dblclick",e=>{ e.stopPropagation(); showProductDetail(prod.id); });
  return box;
}

function renderC4Container(cfg, selList, content){
  const selIds=new Set(selList.map(m=>m.id));
  const showOut = (c4DepDir !== "in");
  const showIn  = (c4DepDir !== "out");

  // Build module-level dep map WITH protocol (aggregated from component deps)
  // modDepProto: "sm||tm" → {proto, callType, topicName, schemaName, direction, purpose, compFrom, compTo, allCompTo[]}
  // Prefer dep that has comp_meta on target (API/endpoint data) over arbitrary first dep
  const modDepProto={};
  DATA.deps.forEach(d=>{
    const sc=byId[d.from], tc=byId[d.to]; if(!sc||!tc) return;
    const sm=sc.module, tm=tc.module; if(!sm||!tm||sm===tm) return;
    const key=`${sm}||${tm}`;
    const cur=modDepProto[key];
    const tgtHasEndpoints=!!(DATA.compMeta||{})[(tc.htmlKey||tc.code||"").toLowerCase()]?.endpoints?.length;
    const srcHasEndpoints=!!(DATA.compMeta||{})[(sc.htmlKey||sc.code||"").toLowerCase()]?.endpoints?.length;
    // EVL components have no endpoints but carry kafka topics: include them in allCompTo
    const tgtIsEvl=(tc?.role||"").toLowerCase()==="evl";
    const isKafkaDep=(d.callType||"").startsWith("kafka")||(d.proto||"").toLowerCase().includes("kafka")||sc?.role==="evl"||tc?.role==="evl";
    const curIsKafka=cur&&((cur.callType||"").startsWith("kafka")||(cur.proto||"").toLowerCase().includes("kafka"));
    const hasBetterProto=d.proto&&(!cur||!cur.proto);
    const hasBetterComp=!cur||(tgtHasEndpoints&&!(DATA.compMeta||{})[(byId[cur.compTo]?.htmlKey||byId[cur.compTo]?.code||"").toLowerCase()]?.endpoints?.length);
    const hasBetterType=isKafkaDep&&!curIsKafka;
    // Prefer entry with fuller kafka schema (headerSchema+payloadSchema) over one without
    const hasBetterSchema=isKafkaDep&&cur&&(d.headerSchema||d.payloadSchema)&&!(cur.headerSchema||cur.payloadSchema);
    if(!cur||hasBetterProto||hasBetterComp||hasBetterType||hasBetterSchema){
      const entry={proto:d.proto||"",callType:d.callType||(isKafkaDep?"kafka-consume":""),
        topicName:d.topicName||"",schemaName:d.schemaName||"",
        headerSchema:d.headerSchema||"",payloadSchema:d.payloadSchema||"",
        direction:d.direction||"",purpose:d.purpose||"",security:d.security||"",
        compFrom:d.from||"",compTo:d.to||"",
        allCompTo: cur?.allCompTo||[]};
      // Include API components AND EVL components in allCompTo for panel lookup
      if((tgtHasEndpoints||tgtIsEvl) && !entry.allCompTo.includes(d.to)) entry.allCompTo.push(d.to);
      modDepProto[key]=entry;
    } else {
      // Even if not replacing best dep, still track EVL and API target components
      if((tgtHasEndpoints||tgtIsEvl) && !cur.allCompTo.includes(d.to)) cur.allCompTo.push(d.to);
    }
  });

  // Outgoing deps: {sm → [{to:tm, proto, callType, ..., compFrom, compTo, allCompTo}, ...]}
  const outModDeps={};
  if(showOut) DATA.deps.forEach(d=>{
    const sc=byId[d.from], tc=byId[d.to]; if(!sc||!tc) return;
    const sm=sc.module, tm=tc.module; if(!sm||!tm||sm===tm) return;
    if(!selIds.has(sm)) return;
    if(!outModDeps[sm]) outModDeps[sm]=[];
    if(!outModDeps[sm].find(x=>x.to===tm)){
      const pi=modDepProto[`${sm}||${tm}`]||{};
      outModDeps[sm].push({to:tm,proto:pi.proto||"",callType:pi.callType||"",
        topicName:pi.topicName||"",schemaName:pi.schemaName||"",
        headerSchema:pi.headerSchema||"",payloadSchema:pi.payloadSchema||"",
        direction:pi.direction||"",purpose:pi.purpose||"",security:pi.security||"",
        compFrom:pi.compFrom||"",compTo:pi.compTo||"",allCompTo:pi.allCompTo||[]});
    }
  });

  // Incoming deps: {sm → [{to:tm, proto, callType, ..., compFrom, compTo, allCompTo}, ...]}
  const inModDeps={};
  if(showIn) DATA.deps.forEach(d=>{
    const sc=byId[d.from], tc=byId[d.to]; if(!sc||!tc) return;
    const sm=sc.module, tm=tc.module; if(!sm||!tm||sm===tm) return;
    if(selIds.has(sm)||!selIds.has(tm)) return;
    if(!inModDeps[sm]) inModDeps[sm]=[];
    if(!inModDeps[sm].find(x=>x.to===tm)){
      const pi=modDepProto[`${sm}||${tm}`]||{};
      inModDeps[sm].push({to:tm,proto:pi.proto||"",callType:pi.callType||"",
        topicName:pi.topicName||"",schemaName:pi.schemaName||"",
        headerSchema:pi.headerSchema||"",payloadSchema:pi.payloadSchema||"",
        direction:pi.direction||"",purpose:pi.purpose||"",security:pi.security||"",
        compFrom:pi.compFrom||"",compTo:pi.compTo||"",allCompTo:pi.allCompTo||[]});
    }
  });

  // External modules
  const externalModSet=new Set();
  if(showOut) Object.values(outModDeps).forEach(list=>list.forEach(x=>{ if(!selIds.has(x.to)) externalModSet.add(x.to); }));
  if(showIn)  Object.keys(inModDeps).forEach(sm=>externalModSet.add(sm));

  // ── Universal module deps (architectural deps not captured in dep data) ──
  if(showOut && (DATA.universalModDeps||[]).length){
    DATA.universalModDeps.forEach(ud=>{
      const toMod=DATA.modules.find(m=>m.code===ud.toModCode); if(!toMod) return;
      selList.forEach(sm=>{
        if(ud.fromModCode!=="*" && sm.code!==ud.fromModCode) return; // wildcard or specific
        if(isFndModule && isFndModule(sm.id)) return; // skip FND→FND
        if(selIds.has(toMod.id)) return;              // skip if target is also selected
        if(!outModDeps[sm.id]) outModDeps[sm.id]=[];
        if(!outModDeps[sm.id].find(x=>x.to===toMod.id)){
          outModDeps[sm.id].push({to:toMod.id,proto:ud.proto||"rest",callType:ud.callType||"sync",
            topicName:"",schemaName:"",headerSchema:"",payloadSchema:"",direction:"",
            purpose:ud.purpose||"",security:"",compFrom:"",compTo:"",
            allCompTo:(ud.entities||[]).map(e=>({entity:e})),_universal:true});
        }
        externalModSet.add(toMod.id);
      });
    });
  }

  // ── FND filter: optionally exclude Foundation modules from dependencies ──
  function isFndModule(mid){
    const m=byId[mid]; if(!m) return false;
    if((m.code||"").toLowerCase().startsWith("fnd")) return true;
    const topP=m.product?topProdOf(m.product):null; if(!topP) return false;
    return (byId[topP]?.code||"").toLowerCase().startsWith("fnd");
  }
  if(!c4ShowFnd){
    [...externalModSet].forEach(mid=>{ if(isFndModule(mid)) externalModSet.delete(mid); });
    Object.keys(outModDeps).forEach(sm=>{
      outModDeps[sm]=outModDeps[sm].filter(x=>!isFndModule(x.to));
    });
    Object.keys(inModDeps).forEach(sm=>{ if(isFndModule(sm)) delete inModDeps[sm]; });
  }

  // Internal: group by top product (only modules with active components)
  const byTopProd={};
  selList.forEach(m=>{
    if(countActiveCompsInProd(m.id)===0) return;  // skip empty modules
    const tp=m.product?topProdOf(m.product):null; if(!tp) return;
    (byTopProd[tp]=byTopProd[tp]||[]).push(m);
  });

  // ── Single-column layout: internal top, external bottom (mirrors L3) ──
  const outerWrapL2=document.createElement("div");
  outerWrapL2.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:row;align-items:center;gap:600px;padding:20px 60px 20px 160px;min-width:fit-content";
  content.appendChild(outerWrapL2);

  // Internal section
  const intColL2=document.createElement("div");
  intColL2.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px";
  outerWrapL2.appendChild(intColL2);
  const intHdrL2=document.createElement("div");
  intHdrL2.innerHTML=`<div class="c4-section-hdr"><span class="c4-int-dot"></span>Selected Modules</div>`;
  intColL2.appendChild(intHdrL2);
  const intWrap=document.createElement("div");
  intWrap.className="c4-boundaries-wrap";
  intWrap.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:80px";
  intColL2.appendChild(intWrap);
  Object.entries(byTopProd)
    .sort(([a],[b])=>(byId[a]?.label||"").localeCompare(byId[b]?.label||""))
    .forEach(([prodId,mods])=>{
      intWrap.appendChild(makeC4ContainerBoundary(prodId, mods, cfg, false, outModDeps, inModDeps));
    });

  // External section: below internal (like L3)
  if(externalModSet.size>0){
    const extLabel = c4DepDir==="out" ? "🔽 Depends on — Module Dependencies"
                   : c4DepDir==="in"  ? "🔼 Is dependency of — Module Dependencies"
                   : "Module Dependencies";
    const extColL2=document.createElement("div");
    extColL2.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;padding-left:16px;border-left:1px dashed #30363d";
    outerWrapL2.appendChild(extColL2);
    const extHdrL2=document.createElement("div");
    extHdrL2.innerHTML=`<div class="c4-section-hdr"><span class="c4-ext-dot"></span>${extLabel}</div>`;
    extColL2.appendChild(extHdrL2);
    const extWrap=document.createElement("div");
    extWrap.className="c4-boundaries-wrap";
    extWrap.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:80px";
    extColL2.appendChild(extWrap);
    const extByProd={};
    [...externalModSet].forEach(mid=>{
      const m=byId[mid]; if(!m) return;
      const tp=m.product?topProdOf(m.product):null; if(!tp) return;
      (extByProd[tp]=extByProd[tp]||[]).push(m);
    });
    Object.entries(extByProd)
      .sort(([a],[b])=>(byId[a]?.label||"").localeCompare(byId[b]?.label||""))
      .forEach(([prodId,mods])=>{
        extWrap.appendChild(makeC4ContainerBoundary(prodId, mods, cfg, true, {}, {}));
      });
  }

  // Unified enriched deps map for arrows
  const allModDeps={};
  if(showOut) Object.entries(outModDeps).forEach(([sm,list])=>{
    allModDeps[sm]=[...list];
  });
  if(showIn)  Object.entries(inModDeps).forEach(([sm,list])=>{
    if(!allModDeps[sm]) allModDeps[sm]=[];
    list.forEach(x=>{ if(!allModDeps[sm].find(e=>e.to===x.to)) allModDeps[sm].push(x); });
  });

  // Equalize module box widths, then reorder by connection gravity, then draw arrows
  requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
    // 1. Equalize all module box widths to the widest box
    const _allBoxes=[...content.querySelectorAll('.c4-container-box')];
    if(_allBoxes.length>1){
      const _maxW=Math.max(..._allBoxes.map(b=>b.getBoundingClientRect().width));
      const _w=Math.ceil(_maxW)+'px';
      _allBoxes.forEach(b=>{b.style.width=_w;b.style.minWidth=_w;b.style.maxWidth=_w;});
    }
    // 2. Reorder modules by barycenter gravity heuristic to minimise crossing arrows
    const _modX={};
    _allBoxes.forEach(b=>{
      const r=b.getBoundingClientRect();
      _modX[b.dataset.id]=r.left+r.width/2;
    });
    [...content.querySelectorAll('.c4-boundary')].forEach(bnd=>{
      const row=bnd.querySelector('.c4-containers-row');
      if(!row) return;
      const boxes=[...row.querySelectorAll(':scope > .c4-container-box')];
      if(boxes.length<2) return;
      function _gravity(mid){
        const xs=[];
        (allModDeps[mid]||[]).forEach(x=>{ if(_modX[x.to]!=null) xs.push(_modX[x.to]); });
        Object.entries(allModDeps).forEach(([src,arr])=>{
          if(src===mid) return;
          arr.forEach(x=>{ if(x.to===mid&&_modX[src]!=null) xs.push(_modX[src]); });
        });
        return xs.length ? xs.reduce((s,v)=>s+v,0)/xs.length : (_modX[mid]||0);
      }
      const gravities=Object.fromEntries(boxes.map(b=>[b.dataset.id,_gravity(b.dataset.id)]));
      boxes.sort((a,b)=>gravities[a.dataset.id]-gravities[b.dataset.id]);
      boxes.forEach(b=>row.appendChild(b));
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(()=>drawC4Arrows(allModDeps, cfg, ".c4-container-box"));
  });
  // ── Diagram counters L2 ──
  const visModCount = selList.length + externalModSet.size;
  const visModIds = new Set([...selList.map(m=>m.id), ...externalModSet]);
  const visCompCount = [...visModIds].reduce((s,mid)=>s+countActiveCompsInProd(mid),0);
  const visProdIds = new Set([...visModIds].map(mid=>{ const m=byId[mid]; return m?.product?topProdOf(m.product):null; }).filter(Boolean));
  updateDiagramCounts(visProdIds.size, visModCount, visCompCount);
}

function makeC4ContainerBoundary(prodId, mods, cfg, isExternal, outModDeps, inModDeps){
  const prod=byId[prodId];
  const [acc]=isExternal?["#6e7681"]:getColor(prodId);
  const activeComps=mods.reduce((s,m)=>s+countActiveCompsInProd(m.id),0);
  const boundary=document.createElement("div");
  boundary.className="c4-boundary";
  boundary.dataset.boundaryId=prodId;
  boundary.dataset.boundaryName=prod?prod.label:prodId;
  boundary.style.borderColor=acc+"80";
  boundary.innerHTML=`
    <div class="c4-boundary-hdr">
      <div class="c4-bnd-name" style="color:${acc}">${prod?prod.label:prodId}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="c4-containers-row"></div>`;
  const row=boundary.querySelector(".c4-containers-row");
  mods.sort((a,b)=>a.label.localeCompare(b.label)).forEach(mod=>{
    const ac=countActiveCompsInProd(mod.id);
    if(!isExternal && ac===0) return;  // skip selected modules with no active components; always show external deps
    const outDeps=(outModDeps[mod.id]||[]).length;
    const inDeps=Object.values(inModDeps).filter(arr=>arr.some(x=>x.to===mod.id)).length;
    if(!isExternal && outDeps===0 && inDeps===0) return;  // skip modules without connections in current view
    const hc=countWithHtml(mod.id);
    const box=document.createElement("div");
    box.className="c4-container-box"+(isExternal?" external":"");
    box.dataset.id=mod.id;
    box.style.borderColor=isExternal?"#6e7681":cfg.border;
    box.innerHTML=`
      <div class="c4-tag">[Module${isExternal?" Dependency":""}]</div>
      <div class="c4-name" style="color:${isExternal?"#6e7681":cfg.border}">${mod.code.toUpperCase()} — ${mod.label.replace(/^[A-Z]+-/,"").trim()}</div>
      <div class="c4-footer">
        <span>⚙ ${ac}</span>
        ${(!isExternal&&(outDeps||inDeps))?`<span>→${outDeps} ←${inDeps}</span>`:""}
      </div>`;
    box.addEventListener("click",  e=>{ e.stopPropagation(); showModuleDetail(mod.id); });
    box.addEventListener("dblclick",e=>{ e.stopPropagation(); showModuleDetail(mod.id); });
    row.appendChild(box);
  });
  return boundary;
}

function renderC4Component(cfg, selList, content){
  const selModIds=new Set(selList.map(m=>m.id));
  const VISIBLE_ROLES=new Set(["api","adn","evl","ui","udn","mfeui"]);
  const showOut=(c4DepDir!=="in");
  const showIn =(c4DepDir!=="out");

  // Collect all visible active components in selected modules
  const visibleCompIds=new Set();
  selList.forEach(m=>{
    (modChildren[m.id]||[]).forEach(cid=>{
      const c=byId[cid];
      if(c && c.status==="1" && VISIBLE_ROLES.has(c.role||"")) visibleCompIds.add(cid);
    });
  });

  // Build comp deps WITH protocol: {from → [{to, proto, callType, topicName, schemaName, headerSchema, payloadSchema, direction, purpose, security}, ...]}
  const compDeps={};
  function pushCompDep(deps, d){
    if(!deps[d.from]) deps[d.from]=[];
    if(!deps[d.from].find(x=>x.to===d.to))
      deps[d.from].push({to:d.to, proto:d.proto||"", callType:d.callType||"",
        topicName:d.topicName||"", schemaName:d.schemaName||"",
        headerSchema:d.headerSchema||"", payloadSchema:d.payloadSchema||"",
        direction:d.direction||"", purpose:d.purpose||"", security:d.security||""});
  }
  if(showOut) DATA.deps.forEach(d=>{
    if(!visibleCompIds.has(d.from)||d.from===d.to) return;
    pushCompDep(compDeps, d);
  });
  if(showIn) DATA.deps.forEach(d=>{
    if(!visibleCompIds.has(d.to)||d.from===d.to) return;
    pushCompDep(compDeps, d);
  });

  // Collect external comp ids — never include components whose module is selected
  const externalCompIds=new Set();
  Object.entries(compDeps).forEach(([src,targets])=>{
    if(!visibleCompIds.has(src)){
      const srcMod=byId[src]?.module;
      if(!srcMod||!selModIds.has(srcMod)) externalCompIds.add(src);
    }
    targets.forEach(x=>{
      if(!visibleCompIds.has(x.to)){
        const tgtMod=byId[x.to]?.module;
        if(!tgtMod||!selModIds.has(tgtMod)) externalCompIds.add(x.to);
      }
    });
  });

  // ── Exclude FND components when !c4ShowFnd ──
  function _isFndComp(cid){
    const c=byId[cid]; if(!c) return false;
    const mod=byId[c.module]; if(!mod) return false;
    if((mod.code||"").toLowerCase().startsWith("fnd")) return true;
    const tp=mod.product?topProdOf(mod.product):null;
    return (byId[tp]?.code||"").toLowerCase().startsWith("fnd");
  }
  if(!c4ShowFnd){
    [...externalCompIds].forEach(cid=>{ if(_isFndComp(cid)) externalCompIds.delete(cid); });
    Object.keys(compDeps).forEach(src=>{
      if(_isFndComp(src)){ delete compDeps[src]; return; }
      compDeps[src]=compDeps[src].filter(x=>!_isFndComp(x.to));
      if(!compDeps[src].length) delete compDeps[src];
    });
  }

  // Compute connected component IDs (those with at least one dep edge in current view)
  const connectedCompIds=new Set();
  Object.entries(compDeps).forEach(([src,targets])=>{
    connectedCompIds.add(src);
    targets.forEach(x=>connectedCompIds.add(x.to));
  });

  // Group by top product
  const byTopProd={};
  selList.forEach(m=>{
    const tp=m.product?topProdOf(m.product):null; if(!tp) return;
    (byTopProd[tp]=byTopProd[tp]||[]).push(m);
  });

  function applyComponentColumns(row, count){
    const cols = count<=3 ? 1 : count<=8 ? 2 : 3;
    row.dataset.cols = cols;
    row.style.gridTemplateColumns = `repeat(${cols}, minmax(120px, 1fr))`;
  }

  function makeCompBox(c, external){
    const box=document.createElement("div");
    box.className="c4-component-box"+(external?" external":"");
    box.style.borderColor=external?"#a19f9d":cfg.border;
    box.dataset.id=c.id;
    const roleTag = c.role==="evl"   ? "[Topic · Kafka]"
                  : c.role==="adn"   ? "[API · .NET]"
                  : c.role==="udn"   ? "[UI · .NET]"
                  : c.role==="mfeui" ? "[UI · MicroFE]"
                  : c.role==="ui"    ? "[UI]"
                  : "[API]";
    box.innerHTML=`
      <div class="c4-tag">${roleTag}</div>
      <div class="c4-name">${c.code||c.label}</div>`;
    box.addEventListener("click",e=>{ e.stopPropagation(); showCompDetail(c.id); });
    return box;
  }

  // ── Universal component deps at L3: add foundation API comps to external panel ──
  if(showOut && c4ShowFnd && (DATA.universalModDeps||[]).length){
    DATA.universalModDeps.forEach(ud=>{
      const toMod=DATA.modules.find(m=>m.code===ud.toModCode); if(!toMod) return;
      // Find active API/ADN components of this foundation module
      const fndComps=(modChildren[toMod.id]||[]).map(id=>byId[id])
        .filter(c=>c && c.status==="1" && (c.role==="api"||c.role==="adn"));
      fndComps.forEach(fc=>{
        externalCompIds.add(fc.id);
        // One synthetic dep per selected module (first visible comp) → foundation comp
        selList.forEach(sm=>{
          if(isFndModuleL3(sm.id)) return;
          const repComp=(modChildren[sm.id]||[]).map(id=>byId[id])
            .find(c=>c && c.status==="1" && VISIBLE_ROLES.has(c.role||""));
          if(!repComp) return;
          if(!compDeps[repComp.id]) compDeps[repComp.id]=[];
          if(!compDeps[repComp.id].find(x=>x.to===fc.id)){
            compDeps[repComp.id].push({to:fc.id,proto:ud.proto||"rest",callType:ud.callType||"sync",
              topicName:"",schemaName:"",headerSchema:"",payloadSchema:"",direction:"",
              purpose:ud.purpose||"",security:"",_universal:true});
          }
        });
      });
    });
  }
  function isFndModuleL3(mid){
    const m=byId[mid]; if(!m) return false;
    if((m.code||"").toLowerCase().startsWith("fnd")) return true;
    const topP=m.product?topProdOf(m.product):null; if(!topP) return false;
    return (byId[topP]?.code||"").toLowerCase().startsWith("fnd");
  }

  // ── Two-column layout wrapper ──
  const outerWrap=document.createElement("div");
  outerWrap.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:row;align-items:center;gap:600px;padding:20px 60px 20px 160px;min-width:fit-content";
  content.appendChild(outerWrap);

  // ── Internal system boundaries (left column) ──
  const intColL3=document.createElement("div");
  intColL3.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px";
  outerWrap.appendChild(intColL3);
  const intHdrL3=document.createElement("div");
  intHdrL3.innerHTML = `<div class="c4-section-hdr"><span class="c4-int-dot"></span>Selected Components</div>`;
  intColL3.appendChild(intHdrL3);
  const intBndWrap=document.createElement("div");
  intBndWrap.className="c4-boundaries-wrap";
  intColL3.appendChild(intBndWrap);
  Object.entries(byTopProd)
    .sort(([a],[b])=>(byId[a]?.label||"").localeCompare(byId[b]?.label||""))
    .forEach(([prodId,mods])=>{
      const prod=byId[prodId];
      const [acc]=getColor(prodId);
      const sysBoundary=document.createElement("div");
      sysBoundary.className="c4-boundary";
      sysBoundary.dataset.boundaryId=prodId;
      sysBoundary.dataset.boundaryName=prod?prod.label:prodId;
      sysBoundary.style.borderColor=acc+"60";
      sysBoundary.innerHTML=`
        <div class="c4-boundary-hdr">
          <div class="c4-bnd-tag" style="color:${acc}">[Product]</div>
          <div class="c4-bnd-name" style="color:${acc}">&nbsp;${prod?prod.label:prodId}</div>
        </div>`;
      const modWrap=document.createElement("div");
      modWrap.className="c4-comp-boundaries-wrap";
      modWrap.style.cssText="flex-wrap:nowrap;flex-direction:column;gap:20px";
      sysBoundary.appendChild(modWrap);
      let hasAny=false;
      mods.sort((a,b)=>a.label.localeCompare(b.label)).forEach(mod=>{
        const activeComps=(modChildren[mod.id]||[]).map(id=>byId[id])
          .filter(c=>c && c.status==="1" && VISIBLE_ROLES.has(c.role||""));
        if(!activeComps.length) return;
        const visibleComps=activeComps.filter(c=>connectedCompIds.has(c.id));
        if(!visibleComps.length) return;  // skip module if all components are orphans
        hasAny=true;
        const modBoundary=document.createElement("div");
        modBoundary.className="c4-comp-boundary";
        modBoundary.dataset.boundaryId=mod.id;
        modBoundary.dataset.boundaryName=mod.code.toUpperCase()+" — "+mod.label.replace(/^[A-Z]+-/,"").trim();
        modBoundary.style.borderColor=acc;
        modBoundary.style.background=acc+"2d";
        modBoundary.innerHTML=`
          <div class="c4-comp-boundary-hdr">
            <span class="c4-bnd-name" style="color:${acc}">${mod.code.toUpperCase()} — ${mod.label.replace(/^[A-Z]+-/,"").trim()}</span>
          </div>`;
        const row=document.createElement("div");
        row.className="c4-components-row";
        applyComponentColumns(row, visibleComps.length);
        visibleComps.sort((a,b)=>(a.code||"").localeCompare(b.code||""))
          .forEach(c=>row.appendChild(makeCompBox(c, false)));
        modBoundary.appendChild(row);
        modWrap.appendChild(modBoundary);
      });
      if(hasAny) intBndWrap.appendChild(sysBoundary);
    });

  // ── External components (right column) ──
  if(externalCompIds.size>0){
    const extLabel = c4DepDir==="out" ? "🔽 Depends on — Component Dependencies"
                   : c4DepDir==="in"  ? "🔼 Is dependency of — Component Dependencies"
                   : "Component Dependencies";
    const extCol=document.createElement("div");
    extCol.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;flex-shrink:0;padding-left:16px;border-left:1px dashed #30363d";
    outerWrap.appendChild(extCol);
    const extHdr=document.createElement("div");
    extHdr.innerHTML=`<div class="c4-section-hdr"><span class="c4-ext-dot"></span>${extLabel}</div>`;
    extCol.appendChild(extHdr);
    // Group external comps: first by top product, then by module within each product
    const extByProd={};
    [...externalCompIds].map(id=>byId[id]).filter(Boolean).forEach(c=>{
      const mid=c.module||"_none";
      const m=byId[mid];
      const tp=m?.product?topProdOf(m.product):"_none";
      if(!extByProd[tp]) extByProd[tp]=[];
      extByProd[tp].push(c);
    });
    const extWrap=document.createElement("div");
    extWrap.style.cssText="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:80px";
    extCol.appendChild(extWrap);
    Object.entries(extByProd)
      .sort(([a],[b])=>(byId[a]?.label||a).localeCompare(byId[b]?.label||b))
      .forEach(([prodId,comps])=>{
        const prod=byId[prodId];
        const acc="#6e7681"; // external: neutral grey (same as L1/L2 external)
        // Product-level boundary (same style as internal column)
        const prodBnd=document.createElement("div");
        prodBnd.className="c4-boundary";
        prodBnd.dataset.boundaryId=prodId;
        prodBnd.dataset.boundaryName=prod?prod.label:prodId;
        prodBnd.style.borderColor=acc+"60";
        prodBnd.innerHTML=`
          <div class="c4-boundary-hdr">
            <div class="c4-bnd-tag" style="color:${acc}">[Product]</div>
            <div class="c4-bnd-name" style="color:${acc}">&nbsp;${prod?prod.label:prodId}</div>
          </div>`;
        // Module-level grouping within product — vertical, no wrap
        const extModWrap=document.createElement("div");
        extModWrap.className="c4-comp-boundaries-wrap";
        extModWrap.style.cssText="flex-wrap:nowrap;flex-direction:column;gap:20px";
        prodBnd.appendChild(extModWrap);
        // Group by module
        const extByMod={};
        comps.forEach(c=>{
          const mid=c.module||"_none";
          (extByMod[mid]=extByMod[mid]||[]).push(c);
        });
        Object.entries(extByMod)
          .sort(([a],[b])=>(byId[a]?.label||a).localeCompare(byId[b]?.label||b))
          .forEach(([mid,mcomps])=>{
            const mod=byId[mid];
            const extBnd=document.createElement("div");
            extBnd.className="c4-comp-boundary";
            extBnd.dataset.boundaryId=mid;
            extBnd.dataset.boundaryName=mod?(mod.code.toUpperCase()+" — "+mod.label.replace(/^[A-Z]+-/,"").trim()):mid;
            extBnd.style.borderColor=acc;
            extBnd.style.background=acc+"2d";
            extBnd.innerHTML=`
              <div class="c4-comp-boundary-hdr">
                <span class="c4-bnd-name" style="color:${acc}">${mod?(mod.code.toUpperCase()+" — "+mod.label.replace(/^[A-Z]+-/,"").trim()):mid}</span>
              </div>`;
            const extRow2=document.createElement("div");
            extRow2.className="c4-components-row";
            applyComponentColumns(extRow2, mcomps.length);
            mcomps.sort((a,b)=>(a.code||"").localeCompare(b.code||""))
              .forEach(c=>extRow2.appendChild(makeCompBox(c, true)));
            extBnd.appendChild(extRow2);
            extModWrap.appendChild(extBnd);
          });
        extWrap.appendChild(prodBnd);
      });
  }

  // ── L3: equalize component boxes; boundaries size naturally to own content ──
  requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
    const allBoxes=[...content.querySelectorAll(".c4-component-box")];
    const allRows=[...content.querySelectorAll(".c4-components-row")];
    // Reset component boxes, grids and boundaries so natural content size is measured
    allBoxes.forEach(b=>{ b.style.width=""; b.style.minWidth=""; });
    allRows.forEach(r=>{ r.style.gridTemplateColumns=`repeat(${r.dataset.cols||1},minmax(120px,1fr))`; });
    [...content.querySelectorAll(".c4-comp-boundary,.c4-boundary")].forEach(b=>{ b.style.width=""; b.style.minWidth=""; });
    requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
      // Equalize all component boxes to the widest one
      const maxW = allBoxes.length ? Math.max(...allBoxes.map(b=>b.getBoundingClientRect().width)) : 0;
      const fixedW = Math.ceil(maxW);
      if(fixedW>0){
        allBoxes.forEach(b=>{ b.style.width=fixedW+"px"; b.style.minWidth=fixedW+"px"; });
        // Fix grid column widths to the equalized pixel value so parent boundaries size correctly
        allRows.forEach(r=>{
          const cols=parseInt(r.dataset.cols||"1");
          r.style.gridTemplateColumns=`repeat(${cols},${fixedW}px)`;
        });
      }
      // Module/product boundaries use CSS width:fit-content — each sizes to its own content + padding
      requestAnimationFrame(()=>drawC4Arrows(compDeps, cfg, ".c4-component-box"));
    });
  });
  // ── Diagram counters L3 ──
  const allVisComps = new Set([...visibleCompIds, ...externalCompIds]);
  const allVisMods  = new Set([...allVisComps].map(cid=>{ const c=byId[cid]; return c?.module||null; }).filter(Boolean));
  const allVisProd  = new Set([...allVisMods].map(mid=>{ const m=byId[mid]; return m?.product?topProdOf(m.product):null; }).filter(Boolean));
  updateDiagramCounts(allVisProd.size, allVisMods.size, allVisComps.size);
}

function drawC4Arrows(deps, cfg, boxSelector){
  // Store last call for fit/unfit redraw
  _lastDeps=deps; _lastCfg=cfg; _lastBoxSel=boxSelector;
  const svg    = document.getElementById("c4-arrows-svg");
  const canvas = document.getElementById("c4-canvas");
  if(!svg||!canvas) return;
  // Natural (unscaled) canvas dimensions for SVG viewport
  const natW = canvas.scrollWidth  || canvas.offsetWidth;
  const natH = canvas.scrollHeight || canvas.offsetHeight;
  svg.setAttribute("width",  Math.max(natW, 1));
  svg.setAttribute("height", Math.max(natH, 1));
  [...svg.children].filter(c=>c.tagName!=="defs").forEach(c=>c.remove());

  // Protocol → {color, label}
  function protoStyle(callType, proto){
    const ct=(callType||"").toLowerCase();
    const pr=(proto||"").toLowerCase();
    if(ct==="mixed") return {color:"#e3b341", label:""};  // sync + async both
    if(ct.startsWith("kafka")||pr.includes("sasl")||pr.includes("kafka"))
      return {color:"#bc8cff", label:""};
    return {color:"#58a6ff", label:""};  // all sync protocols: REST, TLS, UI, etc.
  }

  // Build rich tooltip HTML for an arrow
  // Uses htmlKey/code for compMeta lookup; compFrom/compTo/allCompTo are used for module/product-level arrows
  function buildTipHtml(fromId, toId, callType, proto, topicName, schemaName, headerSchema, payloadSchema, direction, purpose, security, compFrom, compTo, allCompTo, isL1, l1Entities){
    const {color, label}=protoStyle(callType, proto);
    // L1 simplified tooltip: just list entities with direction + sync/async
    if(isL1 && l1Entities && l1Entities.length>0){
      const fromProd=byId[fromId], toProd=byId[toId];
      const fp=fromProd?.code||fromId, tp=toProd?.code||toId;
      let h=`<div class="tt-row" style="font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:#323130;margin-bottom:6px">${fp} <span style="color:var(--text-dim)">↔</span> ${tp}</div>`;
      h+=`<hr class="tt-divider">`;
      const syncEnts=l1Entities.filter(e=>e.proto==="rest"||!e.proto);
      const asyncEnts=l1Entities.filter(e=>e.proto==="kafka");
      if(asyncEnts.length>0){
        h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="margin-bottom:4px"><span style="color:#585aa3;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px">⚡ Async (Kafka)</span></div>`;
        asyncEnts.forEach(e=>{
          h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="padding-left:10px;margin-bottom:2px">${e.icon||"→"} <b style="color:#323130">${e.name}</b></div>`;
        });
      }
      if(syncEnts.length>0){
        if(asyncEnts.length>0) h+=`<div style="height:4px"></div>`;
        h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="margin-bottom:4px"><span style="color:#0096c3;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px">🔗 Sync (REST)</span></div>`;
        syncEnts.forEach(e=>{
          h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="padding-left:10px;margin-bottom:2px">${e.icon||"→"} <b style="color:#323130">${e.name}</b></div>`;
        });
      }
      // Mostra "no OpenAPI definition" per componenti senza swagger
      const _l1NoApi=[];
      const _checkNoApi=(cid)=>{
        if(!cid) return;
        const cn=byId[cid]; if(!cn) return;
        const ck=((cn.htmlKey||cn.code)||"").toLowerCase();
        const cm=(DATA.compMeta||{})[ck]||{};
        if(cm.noOpenApi){ const lbl=cn.code||cid; if(!_l1NoApi.includes(lbl)) _l1NoApi.push(lbl); }
      };
      _checkNoApi(compTo);
      (allCompTo||[]).forEach(_checkNoApi);
      if(_l1NoApi.length>0){
        h+=`<hr class="tt-divider">`;
        _l1NoApi.forEach(lbl=>{
          h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="color:#a19f9d;font-style:italic">ℹ <span style="color:#323130">${lbl}</span>: no OpenAPI definition</div>`;
        });
      }
      return h;
    }
    const fromN=byId[fromId], toN=byId[toId];

    // Resolve comp_meta key for a node, with optional fallback component ID
    function resolveMetaKey(nodeId, fallbackCompId){
      const n=byId[nodeId];
      const tryKeys=[n?.htmlKey,n?.code].filter(Boolean).map(k=>k.toLowerCase());
      for(const k of tryKeys){if(k&&(DATA.compMeta||{})[k]) return k;}
      if(fallbackCompId){
        const fn=byId[fallbackCompId];
        const fbKeys=[fn?.htmlKey,fn?.code].filter(Boolean).map(k=>k.toLowerCase());
        for(const k of fbKeys){if(k&&(DATA.compMeta||{})[k]) return k;}
      }
      // Fuzzy: try suffix stripping
      const allKeys=[...tryKeys, fallbackCompId?[byId[fallbackCompId]?.htmlKey,byId[fallbackCompId]?.code].filter(Boolean).map(k=>k.toLowerCase()):[]].flat();
      for(const key of allKeys){
        const parts=(key||"").split("-");
        for(let l=parts.length-1;l>=1;l--){
          const s=parts.slice(-l).join("-");
          if((DATA.compMeta||{})[s]) return s;
          for(const pfx of ["api","ws","prc","svc","infhub","ifmb","svcmng","ui"]){
            if((DATA.compMeta||{})[pfx+"-"+s]) return pfx+"-"+s;
          }
        }
        const last=(parts||[]).pop();
        if(last&&last.length>4){
          const k2=Object.keys(DATA.compMeta||{}).find(k=>k.endsWith("-"+last)||k===last);
          if(k2) return k2;
        }
      }
      return tryKeys[0]||"";
    }
    const tgtKey=resolveMetaKey(toId, compTo);
    const srcKey=resolveMetaKey(fromId, compFrom);
    const meta=(DATA.compMeta||{})[tgtKey]||{};
    const srcMeta=(DATA.compMeta||{})[srcKey]||{};

    // Fuzzy meta lookup helper (reused in aggregateKafkaTopics and aggregateEndpoints)
    function resolveAndGetMeta(key){
      const cm=DATA.compMeta||{};
      if(!key) return {};
      const parts=key.split("-");
      for(let l=parts.length-1;l>=1;l--){
        const s=parts.slice(-l).join("-");
        if(cm[s]) return cm[s];
      }
      const last=parts[parts.length-1];
      if(last&&last.length>4){const k2=Object.keys(cm).find(k=>k.endsWith("-"+last));if(k2) return cm[k2];}
      return {};
    }

    // Aggregate endpoints from ALL known target components (for module→module arrows)
    function aggregateEndpoints(){
      const seen=new Set();
      const eps=[...(meta.endpoints||[])];
      eps.forEach(e=>seen.add(e.m+"_"+e.p));
      (allCompTo||[]).forEach(cid=>{
        const cn=byId[cid]; if(!cn) return;
        const ck=((cn.htmlKey||cn.code)||"").toLowerCase();
        const cm=(DATA.compMeta||{})[ck]||resolveAndGetMeta(ck);
        if(!cm?.endpoints?.length) return;
        cm.endpoints.forEach(e=>{
          const k=e.m+"_"+e.p;
          if(!seen.has(k)){ seen.add(k); eps.push(e); }
        });
      });
      // L2: scansiona tutti i componenti API del modulo target (come aggregateKafkaTopics)
      function _addModEps(modNodeId){
        (modChildren[modNodeId]||[]).forEach(cid=>{
          const cn=byId[cid]; if(!cn) return;
          const cRole=(cn.role||"").toLowerCase();
          if(cRole!=="api"&&cRole!=="adn"&&cRole!=="ws") return;
          const ck=((cn.htmlKey||cn.code)||"").toLowerCase();
          const cm=(DATA.compMeta||{})[ck]||resolveAndGetMeta(ck);
          if(!cm?.endpoints?.length) return;
          cm.endpoints.forEach(e=>{
            const k=e.m+"_"+e.p;
            if(!seen.has(k)){ seen.add(k); eps.push(e); }
          });
        });
      }
      if(toN?.type==="module") _addModEps(toN.id);
      return eps;
    }

    // Aggregate kafka topics from ALL known target components (for module→module Kafka arrows)
    function aggregateKafkaTopics(){
      const seen=new Set();
      const topics=[...(meta.kafkaTopics||[]),...(srcMeta.kafkaTopics||[])];
      topics.forEach(t=>seen.add(t.topicName));
      // Helper: add kafka topics from a compMeta entry avoiding duplicates
      function _addTopicsFromMeta(cm){
        if(!cm?.kafkaTopics?.length) return;
        cm.kafkaTopics.forEach(t=>{ if(!seen.has(t.topicName)){ seen.add(t.topicName); topics.push(t); } });
      }
      // From allCompTo (explicit component list: API + EVL targets)
      (allCompTo||[]).forEach(cid=>{
        const cn=byId[cid]; if(!cn) return;
        const ck=((cn.htmlKey||cn.code)||"").toLowerCase();
        _addTopicsFromMeta((DATA.compMeta||{})[ck]||resolveAndGetMeta(ck));
      });
      // For L2 module-level arrows: scan ALL components in the target and source module
      // This finds EVL components not explicitly listed in allCompTo
      function _addModuleKafka(modNodeId){
        (modChildren[modNodeId]||[]).forEach(cid=>{
          const cn=byId[cid]; if(!cn) return;
          const ck=((cn.htmlKey||cn.code)||"").toLowerCase();
          _addTopicsFromMeta((DATA.compMeta||{})[ck]||resolveAndGetMeta(ck));
        });
      }
      if(fromN?.type==="module") _addModuleKafka(fromN.id);
      if(toN?.type==="module")   _addModuleKafka(toN.id);
      // For L3 component-level arrows: also look at source component kafka topics
      // (for cases where a PRC consumes from a topic and the dep goes PRC→EVL)
      if(fromN?.type==="component"){
        const fk=((fromN.htmlKey||fromN.code)||"").toLowerCase();
        _addTopicsFromMeta((DATA.compMeta||{})[fk]||resolveAndGetMeta(fk));
      }
      return topics;
    }

    // Helper: render entity fields table (compact)
    function renderEntityFields(entityName, maxFields){
      if(!entityName) return "";
      const fields=(DATA.entityFields||{})[entityName]||[];
      if(!fields.length) return "";
      const limit=maxFields||6;
      let fh=`<div class="tt-entity-fields">`;
      fields.slice(0,limit).forEach(f=>{
        const desc=f.d?` — <span style="color:#6e7681;font-style:italic">${f.d.length>55?f.d.substring(0,55)+"…":f.d}</span>`:"";
        fh+=`<div class="tt-field"><span class="fn">${f.n}</span> <span class="ft">${f.t}</span>${desc}</div>`;
      });
      if(fields.length>limit) fh+=`<div class="tt-field" style="color:var(--text-dim)">+${fields.length-limit} more fields</div>`;
      fh+=`</div>`;
      return fh;
    }

    // Helper: render a Kafka message with headers + payload sections
    function renderKafkaMessage(topic){
      let mh="";
      const hSchema = topic.headerSchema||"";
      const pSchema = topic.payloadSchema||"";
      const msgSchema = topic.schemaName||"";
      // Usa KafkaMessageHeaders come header di default quando non esplicitamente definito
      const effectiveHSchema = hSchema || ((pSchema||msgSchema||topic.topicName) ? "KafkaMessageHeaders" : "");

      if(effectiveHSchema||pSchema){
        // Structured message: render headers and payload as separate sections
        if(effectiveHSchema){
          const hFields=(DATA.entityFields||{})[effectiveHSchema]||[];
          mh+=`<div class="tt-msg-section">`;
          mh+=`<div class="tt-msg-section-hdr">📋 Header <span class="tt-schema-nm">${effectiveHSchema}</span></div>`;
          if(hFields.length){
            hFields.slice(0,5).forEach(f=>{
              const desc=f.d?` — <span style="color:#6e7681;font-style:italic">${f.d.length>50?f.d.substring(0,50)+"…":f.d}</span>`:"";
              mh+=`<div class="tt-field"><span class="fn">${f.n}</span> <span class="ft">${f.t}</span>${desc}</div>`;
            });
            if(hFields.length>5) mh+=`<div class="tt-field" style="color:var(--text-dim)">+${hFields.length-5} more</div>`;
          }
          mh+=`</div>`;
        }
        if(pSchema){
          const pFields=(DATA.entityFields||{})[pSchema]||[];
          mh+=`<div class="tt-msg-section">`;
          mh+=`<div class="tt-msg-section-hdr">📦 Payload <span class="tt-schema-nm">${pSchema}</span></div>`;
          if(pFields.length){
            pFields.slice(0,6).forEach(f=>{
              const desc=f.d?` — <span style="color:#6e7681;font-style:italic">${f.d.length>50?f.d.substring(0,50)+"…":f.d}</span>`:"";
              mh+=`<div class="tt-field"><span class="fn">${f.n}</span> <span class="ft">${f.t}</span>${desc}</div>`;
            });
            if(pFields.length>6) mh+=`<div class="tt-field" style="color:var(--text-dim)">+${pFields.length-6} more</div>`;
          } else {
            mh+=`<div class="tt-field" style="color:#484f58;font-style:italic">complex structure — see swagger</div>`;
          }
          mh+=`</div>`;
        }
      } else if(msgSchema){
        // Controlla se msgSchema ha campi headers+payload che puntano a sotto-schema
        const msgFields=(DATA.entityFields||{})[msgSchema]||[];
        const hField=msgFields.find(f=>f.n==="headers"||f.n==="header");
        const pField=msgFields.find(f=>f.n==="payload");
        if(hField&&pField){
          // Espandi i sotto-schema come sezioni header+payload strutturate
          const subH=hField.t||"KafkaMessageHeaders";
          const subP=pField.t||"";
          const hFields2=(DATA.entityFields||{})[subH]||[];
          mh+=`<div class="tt-msg-section">`;
          mh+=`<div class="tt-msg-section-hdr">📋 Header <span class="tt-schema-nm">${subH}</span></div>`;
          if(hFields2.length){
            hFields2.slice(0,5).forEach(f=>{
              const desc=f.d?` — <span style="color:#6e7681;font-style:italic">${f.d.length>50?f.d.substring(0,50)+"…":f.d}</span>`:"";
              mh+=`<div class="tt-field"><span class="fn">${f.n}</span> <span class="ft">${f.t}</span>${desc}</div>`;
            });
            if(hFields2.length>5) mh+=`<div class="tt-field" style="color:var(--text-dim)">+${hFields2.length-5} more</div>`;
          }
          mh+=`</div>`;
          if(subP){
            const pFields2=(DATA.entityFields||{})[subP]||[];
            mh+=`<div class="tt-msg-section">`;
            mh+=`<div class="tt-msg-section-hdr">📦 Payload <span class="tt-schema-nm">${subP}</span></div>`;
            if(pFields2.length){
              pFields2.slice(0,6).forEach(f=>{
                const desc=f.d?` — <span style="color:#6e7681;font-style:italic">${f.d.length>50?f.d.substring(0,50)+"…":f.d}</span>`:"";
                mh+=`<div class="tt-field"><span class="fn">${f.n}</span> <span class="ft">${f.t}</span>${desc}</div>`;
              });
              if(pFields2.length>6) mh+=`<div class="tt-field" style="color:var(--text-dim)">+${pFields2.length-6} more</div>`;
            } else {
              mh+=`<div class="tt-field" style="color:#484f58;font-style:italic">complex structure — see swagger</div>`;
            }
            mh+=`</div>`;
          }
        } else {
          // Flat schema (no headers/payload split detected)
          mh+=`<div class="tt-row">📦 Schema: <span class="tt-schema-nm">${msgSchema}</span></div>`;
          mh+=renderEntityFields(msgSchema, 8);
        }
      }
      return mh;
    }

    // Determine type — fall back to compTo/compFrom node roles when direct nodes have no role (e.g. modules)
    const compToN=compTo?byId[compTo]:null;
    const compFromN=compFrom?byId[compFrom]:null;
    const toRole=((toN?.role||compToN?.role)||"").toLowerCase();
    const fromRole=((fromN?.role||compFromN?.role)||"").toLowerCase();
    let ct=callType||"";
    if(!ct){
      if(toRole==="evl"||fromRole==="evl") ct="kafka-consume";
      else if(toRole==="api"||toRole==="adn") ct="https-rest";
      else if(toRole==="ui"||toRole==="mfeui"||toRole==="udn") ct="ui-call";
    }
    const pr=proto||"";
    const isKafka=ct.startsWith("kafka")||pr.toLowerCase().includes("sasl")||pr.toLowerCase().includes("kafka")||toRole==="evl"||fromRole==="evl";
    const isRest=!isKafka&&(ct==="https-rest"||pr.toLowerCase().includes("rest")||toRole==="api"||toRole==="adn");
    const isTls=!isKafka&&!isRest&&(ct==="https-tls"||pr.toLowerCase().includes("tls"));
    const isUi=ct==="ui-call"||toRole==="ui"||toRole==="mfeui"||toRole==="udn";

    const fromLabel=fromN?.code||compFromN?.code||fromId;
    const toLabel=toN?.code||compToN?.code||toId;

    // Helper: render entity fields from DATA.entityFields (used by REST endpoints section)
    function renderEntityFieldsLegacy(entityName){
      return renderEntityFields(entityName, 5);
    }

    let protoLabel=pr||callType||"";
    if(isKafka)      protoLabel="Kafka · "+(security||pr||"SASL/SCRAM-SHA-512");
    else if(isRest)  protoLabel="HTTPS/REST";
    else if(isTls)   protoLabel="TCP+TLS (HTTPS)";
    else if(isUi)    protoLabel="UI Call";
    else if(!protoLabel) protoLabel="uncatalogued protocol";

    let h=`<div class="tt-proto" style="color:${color||'#8b949e'}">${label||protoLabel}</div>`;
    h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="font-size:14px;margin-bottom:4px;color:#484f58">${protoLabel}</div>`;
    h+=`<div class="tt-row">📤 <span>${fromLabel}</span> → <span>${toLabel}</span></div>`;
    h+=`<hr class="tt-divider">`;

    if(isKafka){
      const evlCode=(toRole==="evl"?toN?.code:fromRole==="evl"?fromN?.code:"")||"";
      const tn=topicName||evlCode||"";
      const allTopics=aggregateKafkaTopics();
      const topicInfo=tn?allTopics.find(t=>t.topicName===tn||t.topicName===tgtKey):null;
      // If no specific topic, show all kafka topics for this connection
      const topicsToShow=topicInfo?[topicInfo]:allTopics.slice(0,4);
      const dir=(direction||topicInfo?.direction||"").toUpperCase();

      // Merge edge-level header/payload schema into topicInfo when available
      const effectiveTopic = topicInfo ? {
        ...topicInfo,
        headerSchema: headerSchema || topicInfo.headerSchema || "",
        payloadSchema: payloadSchema || topicInfo.payloadSchema || "",
      } : null;

      if(tn){
        const purp=purpose||topicInfo?.purpose||"";
        const sec=security||topicInfo?.security||topicInfo?.proto||"";
        const topicForRender=effectiveTopic||{schemaName:schemaName||"",headerSchema:headerSchema||"",payloadSchema:payloadSchema||""};
        h+=`<div class="tt-topic-sec">`;
        h+=`<div class="tt-topic-hdr">📡 <span style="color:#bc8cff;font-family:monospace">${tn}</span>`;
        if(dir) h+=` <span style="font-size:13px;color:#a19f9d">${dir==="PRODUCE"||dir==="OUT"?"⬆ Produce (write)":"⬇ Consume (read)"}</span>`;
        h+=`<span class="acc-icon" style="margin-left:auto">−</span></div>`;
        h+=`<div class="acc-content">`;
        h+=renderKafkaMessage(topicForRender);
        if(sec) h+=`<div class="tt-sec">🔒 ${sec}</div>`;
        if(purp) h+=`<div class="tt-purpose">${purp.length>150?purp.substring(0,150)+"…":purp}</div>`;
        h+=`</div></div>`;
      } else if(topicsToShow.length){
        h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px">📡 Kafka Topics (${allTopics.length}):</div>`;
        topicsToShow.forEach(t=>{
          const tdir=(t.direction||"").toUpperCase();
          const dirIcon=tdir==="PRODUCE"||tdir==="OUT"?"⬆":"⬇";
          h+=`<div class="tt-topic-sec">`;
          h+=`<div class="tt-topic-hdr">${dirIcon} <span style="color:#bc8cff;font-family:monospace">${t.topicName}</span>`;
          if(t.schemaName) h+=` <span class="tt-schema">${t.schemaName}</span>`;
          h+=`<span class="acc-icon" style="margin-left:auto">−</span></div>`;
          h+=`<div class="acc-content">`;
          h+=renderKafkaMessage(t);
          if(t.purpose) h+=`<div class="tt-purpose" style="margin-left:8px">${t.purpose.length>100?t.purpose.substring(0,100)+"…":t.purpose}</div>`;
          h+=`</div></div>`;
        });

      } else {
        h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="color:#484f58;font-style:italic">No topic details available</div>`;
      }

    } else if(isRest||isTls){
      const eps=aggregateEndpoints();
      if(eps.length){
        const total=eps.length;
        const compName=compToN?.code||toN?.code||"";
        h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px">🔗 API Endpoints (${total}):</div>`;
        if(compName) h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="font-size:13px;color:#a19f9d;margin-bottom:3px">→ ${compName}</div>`;
        const epsByEntity={};
        const entityOrder=[];
        eps.forEach(ep=>{
          const t=ep.t||"Other";
          if(!epsByEntity[t]){epsByEntity[t]=[];entityOrder.push(t);}
          epsByEntity[t].push(ep);
        });
        entityOrder.sort();
        entityOrder.forEach(entity=>{
          const eEps=epsByEntity[entity];
          h+=`<div class="tt-mgrp">`;
          h+=`<div class="tt-mgrp-hdr"><span style="color:#1168bd;font-weight:700">${entity}</span><span style="color:#a19f9d;margin-left:5px">(${eEps.length})</span><span class="acc-icon" style="margin-left:auto">−</span></div>`;
          h+=`<div class="acc-content">`;
          eEps.forEach(ep=>{
            const mc2=(ep.m||"GET").toLowerCase();
            let schemas="";
            if(ep.req&&ep.resp) schemas=`<span class="tt-schema"> ${ep.req} → ${ep.resp}</span>`;
            else if(ep.resp)    schemas=`<span class="tt-schema"> → ${ep.resp}</span>`;
            else if(ep.req)     schemas=`<span class="tt-schema"> ${ep.req}</span>`;
            h+=`<div class="tt-ep-wrap">`;
            h+=`<div class="tt-ep tt-ep-toggle"><span class="tt-method ${mc2}">${ep.m||"GET"}</span><span class="tt-path">${ep.p}</span><span class="acc-icon" style="margin-left:auto">+</span></div>`;
            h+=`<div class="tt-ep-detail acc-content" style="display:none">`;
            if(ep.desc) h+=`<div style="font-size:13px;color:#605e5c;padding-left:6px;margin-bottom:3px">${ep.desc.length>150?ep.desc.substring(0,150)+"…":ep.desc}</div>`;
            if(ep.req) h+=renderEntityFields(ep.req);
            if(ep.resp&&ep.resp!==ep.req) h+=renderEntityFields(ep.resp.replace("[]",""));
            h+=`</div></div>`;
          });
          h+=`</div></div>`;
        });
      } else {
        const tgtNode = compToN || toN;
        const tgtRole = tgtNode?.role || "";
        const tgtLabel = tgtNode?.code || toLabel;
        const SKIP_ROLES = new Set(["db","lib","kc","idx"]);
        if(SKIP_ROLES.has(tgtRole)){
          const roleLabel = tgtRole==="db"?"Database" : tgtRole==="lib"?"Library" : tgtRole==="idx"?"Index/Cache" : tgtRole.toUpperCase();
          h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="color:#a19f9d;font-style:italic">🗄 ${roleLabel}: <span style="color:#323130">${tgtLabel}</span> <span style="font-size:15px">(no API endpoint)</span></div>`;
        } else {
          // Check for explicit no-OpenAPI flag (UI components, applicationlogs, etc.)
          const _noApiMeta = meta?.noOpenApi ? meta : (srcMeta?.noOpenApi ? srcMeta : null);
          if(_noApiMeta){
            const _reason = _noApiMeta.noOpenApiReason || "no OpenAPI definition";
            h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="color:#a19f9d;font-style:italic">ℹ <span style="color:#323130">${tgtLabel}</span>: ${_reason}</div>`;
          } else {
            h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="color:#484f58;font-style:italic">No endpoint catalogued for <span style="color:#323130">${tgtLabel}</span></div>`;
          }
        }
      }
    } else if(isUi){
      // Always check for noOpenApi on UI-call arrows
      const _uiNoApi = meta?.noOpenApi ? meta : (srcMeta?.noOpenApi ? srcMeta : null);
      if(_uiNoApi){
        const _uiReason = _uiNoApi.noOpenApiReason || "UI — no OpenAPI definition";
        h+=`<div class="tt-row">🖥 <span style="color:#a19f9d;font-style:italic">${_uiReason}</span></div>`;
      } else {
        h+=`<div class="tt-row">🖥 UI Navigation</div>`;
      }
    } else {
      h+=`<div class="tt-row" style="color:#484f58;font-style:italic">Dependency (uncatalogued protocol)</div>`;
    }
    return h;
  }

  // Build a flat dep list including all enrichment fields
  const flatDeps=[];
  const entries = (deps instanceof Map) ? [...deps.entries()] : Object.entries(deps);
  entries.forEach(([fromId,toSet])=>{
    const toList=(toSet instanceof Set)?[...toSet]:toSet;
    toList.forEach(item=>{
      if(typeof item==="string")
        flatDeps.push({from:fromId,to:item,proto:"",callType:"",topicName:"",schemaName:"",headerSchema:"",payloadSchema:"",direction:"",purpose:"",security:"",compFrom:"",compTo:"",allCompTo:[]});
      else
        flatDeps.push({
          from:fromId, to:item.to||item,
          proto:item.proto||"", callType:item.callType||"",
          topicName:item.topicName||"", schemaName:item.schemaName||"",
          headerSchema:item.headerSchema||"", payloadSchema:item.payloadSchema||"",
          direction:item.direction||"", purpose:item.purpose||"",
          security:item.security||"",
          compFrom:item.compFrom||"", compTo:item.compTo||"",
          allCompTo:item.allCompTo||[],
          _l1:!!item._l1,
          _allEntities:item._allEntities||[]
        });
    });
  });

  const canvasRect=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  function boxCtr(id){
    const el=canvas.querySelector(`${boxSelector}[data-id="${id}"]`); if(!el) return null;
    const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();
    const s=_vpScale||1;
    return { x:(r.left-canvasRect.left+r.width/2)/s, y:(r.top-canvasRect.top+r.height/2)/s };
  }
  // Full bounding rect in natural canvas coords
  function boxRect(id){
    const el=canvas.querySelector(`${boxSelector}[data-id="${id}"]`); if(!el) return null;
    const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); const s=_vpScale||1;
    const l=(r.left-canvasRect.left)/s, t=(r.top-canvasRect.top)/s;
    return {left:l,top:t,right:l+r.width/s,bottom:t+r.height/s,cx:l+r.width/s/2,cy:t+r.height/s/2,w:r.width/s,h:r.height/s};
  }
  // Point on edge of rect at fractional position along the edge
  function getEdgePt(rect,edge,frac){
    const m=Math.min(7,rect.h/4,rect.w/4);
    if(edge==='right') return {x:rect.right, y:rect.top+m+(rect.h-2*m)*frac};
    if(edge==='left')  return {x:rect.left,  y:rect.top+m+(rect.h-2*m)*frac};
    if(edge==='bottom')return {x:rect.left+m+(rect.w-2*m)*frac, y:rect.bottom};
    return                    {x:rect.left+m+(rect.w-2*m)*frac, y:rect.top};
  }
  // Collect all node bounding rects (natural coords) for collision avoidance
  const s_pz=_vpScale||1;
  const _nodeRects=[...canvas.querySelectorAll(`${boxSelector}[data-id]`)].map(el=>{
    const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();
    const nx=(r.left-canvasRect.left)/s_pz, ny=(r.top-canvasRect.top)/s_pz;
    return {x:nx-6,y:ny-6,w:r.width/s_pz+12,h:r.height/s_pz+12};
  });
  const _bndRects=[...canvas.querySelectorAll('.c4-boundary')].map(el=>{
    const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); const s=_vpScale||1;
    const t=(r.top-canvasRect.top)/s;
    return {top:t,bottom:t+r.height/s,left:(r.left-canvasRect.left)/s};
  }).sort((a,b)=>a.top-b.top);
  function _skipsBnd(y1,y2){
    const lo=Math.min(y1,y2)+5, hi=Math.max(y1,y2)-5;
    return _bndRects.some(b=>b.top>lo&&b.bottom<hi);
  }
  // Global safe routing lanes (guaranteed outside all module rects)
  const _routeType={};
  let _gTopLane=0,_gBotLane=0,_gLftLane=0,_gRgtLane=0;
  if(_nodeRects.length){
    _gTopLane=Math.min(..._nodeRects.map(r=>r.y))-50;
    _gBotLane=Math.max(..._nodeRects.map(r=>r.y+r.h))+50;
    _gLftLane=Math.min(..._nodeRects.map(r=>r.x))-65;
    _gRgtLane=Math.max(..._nodeRects.map(r=>r.x+r.w))+65;
  }
  // Also track already-placed entity boxes to avoid mutual overlap
  const _placedEntityBoxes=[];
  function _hitsNode(bx,by,bw,bh){
    if(_nodeRects.some(n=>bx<n.x+n.w&&bx+bw>n.x&&by<n.y+n.h&&by+bh>n.y)) return true;
    if(_placedEntityBoxes.some(n=>bx<n.x+n.w&&bx+bw>n.x&&by<n.y+n.h&&by+bh>n.y)) return true;
    return false;
  }

  // ── Pre-compute distributed edge exit/entry points ──
  // Arrows exit from the actual box edge (not center), distributed to avoid bunching
  const _fcMap={}, _tcMap={}, _cenMap={};
  {
    const _seen0=new Set(), _pre=[];
    let _n0=0;
    flatDeps.forEach(item=>{
      const fid=item.from, tid=item.to||item;
      if(typeof tid!=='string') return;
      const k=`${fid}||${tid}`; if(_seen0.has(k)) return; _seen0.add(k);
      if(_n0++>2000) return;
      const fr=boxRect(fid); if(!fr) return;
      const tr=boxRect(tid); if(!tr) return;
      const dx=tr.cx-fr.cx, dy=tr.cy-fr.cy, adx=Math.abs(dx), ady=Math.abs(dy);
      // Same-product detection for L2 (arc outside)
      const _ispL2 = boxSelector==='.c4-container-box' && (()=>{
        const fm=byId[fid], tm=byId[tid];
        if(!fm||!tm||!fm.product||!tm.product) return false;
        return topProdOf(fm.product)===topProdOf(tm.product);
      })();
      // Same-product, same-column detection for L3 (use .external class — reliable vs x-pos)
      const _ispL3SameSideA = boxSelector==='.c4-component-box' && (()=>{
        const fc2=byId[fid], tc2=byId[tid]; if(!fc2||!tc2) return false;
        const fmod=byId[fc2.module], tmod=byId[tc2.module];
        if(!fmod||!tmod||!fmod.product||!tmod.product) return false;
        if(topProdOf(fmod.product)!==topProdOf(tmod.product)) return false;
        const _fEl=canvas.querySelector(`.c4-component-box[data-id="${fid}"]`);
        const _tEl=canvas.querySelector(`.c4-component-box[data-id="${tid}"]`);
        const _fExt=_fEl?_fEl.classList.contains("external"):false;
        const _tExt=_tEl?_tEl.classList.contains("external"):false;
        return _fExt===_tExt; // both internal or both external = same column
      })();
      let fe, te;
      if(_ispL2){
        // L2 same-product: exit from the outer edge of the column
        // left column (selected) → arc curves left; right column (external) → arc curves right
        const _goLeft = fr.cx < natW * 0.5;
        fe=_goLeft?'left':'right'; te=_goLeft?'left':'right';
      } else if(boxSelector==='.c4-container-box'){
        // L2 non-same-product: exit/arrive from left/right (short sides of the wide module box)
        fe=dx>=0?'right':'left'; te=dx>=0?'left':'right'; _routeType[k]='side';
      } else if(boxSelector==='.c4-system-box' && adx<200){fe=dy>0?'bottom':'top';te=dy>0?'top':'bottom';}
      else if(adx>200||boxSelector==='.c4-system-box'){fe=dx>0?'right':'left';te=dx>0?'left':'right';}
      else if(boxSelector==='.c4-component-box'){
        const _sameMod3=byId[fid]?.module&&byId[fid].module===byId[tid]?.module;
        if(_sameMod3){const _goLeft3=fr.cx<natW*0.5;fe=_goLeft3?'left':'right';te=_goLeft3?'left':'right';}
      else if(_ispL3SameSideA){
          // Same product, same column: arc outside (left for internal col, right for external col)
          const _fEl2=canvas.querySelector(`.c4-component-box[data-id="${fid}"]`);
          const _isExt2=_fEl2?_fEl2.classList.contains("external"):false;
          fe=_isExt2?'right':'left'; te=_isExt2?'right':'left';
        }else{fe=dx>=0?'right':'left';te=dx>=0?'left':'right';_routeType[k]='side';}
      }
      else if(ady<120){fe='top';te='top';}
      else{fe=dy>0?'bottom':'top';te=dy>0?'top':'bottom';}
      _pre.push({k,fid,tid,fr,tr,fe,te});
    });
    // Group by (boxId, edge) and sort by opposite-box position, then assign fraction
    const sg={}, dg={};
    _pre.forEach(a=>{(sg[`${a.fid}||${a.fe}`]=sg[`${a.fid}||${a.fe}`]||[]).push(a);});
    _pre.forEach(a=>{(dg[`${a.tid}||${a.te}`]=dg[`${a.tid}||${a.te}`]||[]).push(a);});
    Object.entries(sg).forEach(([gk,arr])=>{
      const edge=gk.split('||')[1]; const isV=edge==='left'||edge==='right';
      arr.sort((a,b)=>isV?a.tr.cy-b.tr.cy:a.tr.cx-b.tr.cx);
      arr.forEach((a,i)=>{ _fcMap[a.k]=getEdgePt(a.fr,edge,arr.length===1?0.5:i/(arr.length-1)); });
    });
    Object.entries(dg).forEach(([gk,arr])=>{
      const edge=gk.split('||')[1]; const isV=edge==='left'||edge==='right';
      arr.sort((a,b)=>isV?a.fr.cy-b.fr.cy:a.fr.cx-b.fr.cx);
      arr.forEach((a,i)=>{ _tcMap[a.k]=getEdgePt(a.tr,edge,arr.length===1?0.5:i/(arr.length-1)); });
    });
    _pre.forEach(a=>{ _cenMap[a.k]={frCx:a.fr.cx,frCy:a.fr.cy,trCx:a.tr.cx,trCy:a.tr.cy}; });
  }

  // ── Edge entity label helpers ──
  function splitCamel(s, maxLen){
    if(!s) return "";
    const max=maxLen||22;
    // Split CamelCase: "DeviceStatus" → "Device Status"
    const spaced=s.replace(/([a-z])([A-Z])/g,"$1 $2").replace(/([A-Z]+)([A-Z][a-z])/g,"$1 $2");
    if(spaced.length<=max) return spaced;
    // Truncate at last word boundary
    const words=spaced.split(" ");
    let result="";
    for(const w of words){
      if(!result){ result=w; continue; }
      if((result+" "+w).length<=max-1) result+=" "+w;
      else{ result+="…"; break; }
    }
    return result;
  }

  function edgeEntityLabels(depDirection, callType, proto, topicName, schemaName, headerSchema, payloadSchema, tgtKey, allCompTo, toNodeId, compToId){
    const ct=(callType||"").toLowerCase();
    const pr=(proto||"").toLowerCase();
    const _tN=toNodeId?byId[toNodeId]:null;
    const _cN=compToId?byId[compToId]:null;
    const toRole=((_tN?.role)||(_cN?.role)||"").toLowerCase();
    const isKafka=ct.startsWith("kafka")||pr.includes("sasl")||pr.includes("kafka")||toRole==="evl";
    const isRest=!isKafka&&(ct==="https-rest"||pr.includes("rest")||ct==="https-tls"||pr.includes("tls")||toRole==="api"||toRole==="adn");

    // Direction icon from dep's direction field (most authoritative)
    const dd=(depDirection||"").toLowerCase();
    const kafkaIconFromDep=dd==="produce"||dd==="out"?"↑":dd==="consume"||dd==="in"?"↓":dd==="both"?"⇅":null;

    // Fuzzy compMeta lookup: try exact key, then suffix stripping, then partial match
    function findMeta(key){
      const cm=DATA.compMeta||{};
      if(key&&cm[key]) return cm[key];
      if(!key) return {};
      const parts=key.split("-");
      for(let l=parts.length-1;l>=1;l--){
        const s=parts.slice(-l).join("-");
        if(cm[s]) return cm[s];
        for(const pfx of ["api","ws","prc","svc","infhub","ifmb","svcmng","ui"]){
          if(cm[pfx+"-"+s]) return cm[pfx+"-"+s];
        }
      }
      const last=parts[parts.length-1];
      if(last&&last.length>4){
        const k2=Object.keys(cm).find(k=>k.endsWith("-"+last)||k===last);
        if(k2) return cm[k2];
      }
      return {};
    }

    if(isKafka){
      // Helper: extract entity name from a kafkaTopics array
      function _extractKafkaNames(topics, limit){
        const seen2=new Set(), results2=[];
        for(const t of topics){
          const ps=(t.payloadSchema||t.schemaName||"").replace(/TopicMessage$/,"").replace(/Message$/,"").replace(/Event$/,"");
          const nm=ps||((t.topicName||"").split("-").slice(-2).join("-"));
          if(nm&&!seen2.has(nm)){
            seen2.add(nm);
            const tDir=(t.direction||"").toUpperCase();
            const icon=kafkaIconFromDep||(tDir==="PRODUCE"||tDir==="OUT"?"↑":tDir==="CONSUME"||tDir==="IN"?"↓":"⇅");
            results2.push({name:splitCamel(nm,22), icon, proto:"kafka"});
            if(results2.length>=(limit||4)) break;
          }
        }
        return results2;
      }
      // 1. Direct payloadSchema/schemaName from the dep edge (most authoritative)
      let s=payloadSchema||schemaName||"";
      s=s.replace(/TopicMessage$/,"").replace(/Message$/,"").replace(/Event$/,"");
      if(s) return [{name:splitCamel(s,22), icon:kafkaIconFromDep||"⇅", proto:"kafka"}];
      // 2. From compMeta of the direct target key
      const meta=findMeta(tgtKey);
      const res2=_extractKafkaNames(meta.kafkaTopics||[], 4);
      if(res2.length) return res2;
      // 3. From allCompTo (includes EVL + API components after fix)
      const allTopicsFromCompTo=[];
      const seenCid=new Set();
      for(const cid of (allCompTo||[])){
        const cn=byId[cid]; if(!cn||seenCid.has(cid)) continue;
        seenCid.add(cid);
        const ck=((cn.htmlKey||cn.code)||"").toLowerCase();
        const cm2=findMeta(ck);
        (cm2?.kafkaTopics||[]).forEach(t=>allTopicsFromCompTo.push(t));
      }
      const res3=_extractKafkaNames(allTopicsFromCompTo, 4);
      if(res3.length) return res3;
      // 4. Fallback: scan all components in the target module (for L2)
      const toMN=toNodeId?byId[toNodeId]:null;
      if(toMN?.type==="module"){
        const modTopics=[];
        (modChildren[toMN.id]||[]).forEach(cid=>{
          const cn=byId[cid]; if(!cn) return;
          const ck=((cn.htmlKey||cn.code)||"").toLowerCase();
          const cm3=findMeta(ck);
          (cm3?.kafkaTopics||[]).forEach(t=>modTopics.push(t));
        });
        const res4=_extractKafkaNames(modTopics, 4);
        if(res4.length) return res4;
      }
      // 5. Last resort: use topic name segments
      if(topicName){const segs=topicName.split("-");return [{name:segs.length>=2?segs.slice(-2).join("-"):segs[segs.length-1], icon:kafkaIconFromDep||"⇅", proto:"kafka"}];}
      return [];
    }

    if(isRest){
      const meta=findMeta(tgtKey);
      const results3=[], seen3=new Set();
      for(const ep of (meta.endpoints||[])){
        if(ep?.resp){const r=splitCamel(ep.resp.replace("[]",""),22);if(!seen3.has(r)){seen3.add(r);results3.push({name:r,icon:"→",proto:"rest"});}}
        if(results3.length>=4) break;
      }
      if(results3.length) return results3;
      for(const cid of (allCompTo||[])){
        const cn=byId[cid]; if(!cn) continue;
        const ck=((cn.htmlKey||cn.code)||"").toLowerCase();
        const cm3=findMeta(ck);
        for(const ep2 of (cm3.endpoints||[])){
          if(ep2?.resp){const r=splitCamel(ep2.resp.replace("[]",""),22);if(!seen3.has(r)){seen3.add(r);results3.push({name:r,icon:"→",proto:"rest"});}}
          if(results3.length>=4) break;
        }
        if(results3.length) break;
      }
      return results3;
    }
    return [];
  }

  // ── L1/L2: aggregate parallel edges between same pair (including bidirectional A↔B) ──
  let drawList = flatDeps;
  if(boxSelector===".c4-container-box" || boxSelector===".c4-system-box"){
    const _pairMap={};
    flatDeps.forEach(item=>{
      const k=`${item.from}||${item.to||item}`;
      if(typeof (item.to||item)!=='string') return;
      if(!_pairMap[k]){
        _pairMap[k]={...item, _aggItems:[item],
          _allEntities: item._allEntities ? [...item._allEntities] : [] };
      } else {
        _pairMap[k]._aggItems.push(item);
        if(item._allEntities) _pairMap[k]._allEntities.push(...item._allEntities);
      }
    });
    const isAsync=ct=>((ct||"").toLowerCase().startsWith("kafka")||(ct||"").toLowerCase().includes("event"));
    const aggColor=items=>{
      const hasSync=items.some(it=>!isAsync(it.callType));
      const hasAs  =items.some(it=> isAsync(it.callType));
      return (hasSync&&hasAs)?"mixed":(hasAs?"kafka-consume":(items[0]?.callType||""));
    };
    // Merge bidirectional pairs: A→B + B→A → single bidi arrow
    const _handled=new Set();
    drawList = Object.values(_pairMap).map(agg=>{
      const fwd=`${agg.from}||${agg.to}`;
      const rev=`${agg.to}||${agg.from}`;
      if(_handled.has(fwd)) return null;
      _handled.add(fwd); _handled.add(rev);
      const revAgg=_pairMap[rev];
      if(revAgg){
        // Bidirectional: merge both directions into one arrow with double arrowhead
        const allItems=[...agg._aggItems,...revAgg._aggItems];
        const allEnts=[...agg._allEntities,...revAgg._allEntities];
        return {...agg, callType:aggColor(allItems), _aggItems:allItems, _allEntities:allEnts, _isBidi:true};
      }
      // Unidirectional: still merge parallel same-direction edges
      return {...agg, callType:aggColor(agg._aggItems)};
    }).filter(Boolean);
  }

  let n=0;
  const seen=new Set();
  drawList.forEach((item)=>{
    const {from:fromId,to:toId,proto,callType,topicName,schemaName,headerSchema,payloadSchema,direction,purpose,security,compFrom,compTo,allCompTo} = item;
    const key=`${fromId}||${toId}`; if(seen.has(key)) return; seen.add(key);
    if(n++>2000) return;
    // Use pre-computed edge points (distributed, not center)
    const fc=_fcMap[key]; if(!fc) return;
    const tc=_tcMap[key]; if(!tc) return;
    // Center-to-center direction for routing classification
    const cen=_cenMap[key]||{frCx:fc.x,frCy:fc.y,trCx:tc.x,trCy:tc.y};
    const _cdx=cen.trCx-cen.frCx, _cdy=cen.trCy-cen.frCy;

    // Auto-detect EVL/Kafka when callType missing
    let effCT=callType, effPR=proto;
    if(!effCT){
      const _tN=byId[toId], _fN=byId[fromId];
      const _tR=((_tN?.role)||byId[compTo]?.role||"").toLowerCase();
      const _fR=((_fN?.role)||byId[compFrom]?.role||"").toLowerCase();
      if(_tR==="evl"||_fR==="evl") effCT="kafka-consume";
      else if(_tR==="api"||_tR==="adn") effCT="https-rest";
      else if(_tR==="ui"||_tR==="mfeui"||_tR==="udn") effCT="ui-call";
    }
    const {color, label} = protoStyle(effCT, effPR);
