    // Resolve target meta key for entity label lookup
    const tgtNode=byId[toId];
    const tgtKeyForLabel=[tgtNode?.htmlKey,tgtNode?.code,byId[compTo]?.htmlKey,byId[compTo]?.code]
      .filter(Boolean).map(k=>k.toLowerCase())
      .find(k=>(DATA.compMeta||{})[k]) || ((tgtNode?.htmlKey||tgtNode?.code||"").toLowerCase());
    const tipHtml = buildTipHtml(fromId, toId, effCT, effPR, topicName, schemaName, headerSchema, payloadSchema, direction, purpose, security, compFrom, compTo, allCompTo, item._l1, item._allEntities);

    const dx=tc.x-fc.x, dy=tc.y-fc.y;
    // Use center-to-center for routing classification, edge points for actual path
    const absDx=Math.abs(_cdx), absDy=Math.abs(_cdy);
    // Detect same product for L2 (arc outside)
    const _sameProd = boxSelector===".c4-container-box" && (()=>{
      const fm=byId[fromId], tm=byId[toId]; if(!fm||!tm) return false;
      const fp=fm.product, tp=tm.product; if(!fp||!tp) return false;
      return topProdOf(fp)===topProdOf(tp);
    })();
    // ── Arrow routing: cases to avoid overlapping nodes ──
    let d, _laneX=0, _arcY=0, _laneY=0, _sideX=0;
    if(boxSelector===".c4-system-box" && absDx<200){
      // L1 same column: route OUTSIDE (left for left col, right for right col)
      const isLeft=(cen.frCx+cen.trCx)/2 < natW/2;
      _sideX=isLeft ? Math.min(fc.x,tc.x)-100 : Math.max(fc.x,tc.x)+100;
      d=`M${fc.x},${fc.y} C${_sideX},${fc.y} ${_sideX},${tc.y} ${tc.x},${tc.y}`;
    } else if(_sameProd){
      // L2 same-product same-column: circular arc curves outward — never crosses sibling modules
      // Arc radius proportional to vertical distance; clamped to stay within visible canvas
      const arcOff=Math.max(80, Math.abs(tc.y-fc.y)*0.6) + (n%3)*25;
      if(fc.x < natW*0.5){
        // Left column (selected): arc curves to the LEFT — clamp to ≥10px to stay on-screen
        _laneX=Math.max(10, fc.x - arcOff);
      } else {
        // Right column (external): arc curves to the RIGHT — clamp to ≤natW-10px
        _laneX=Math.min(natW-10, fc.x + arcOff);
      }
      d=`M${fc.x},${fc.y} C${_laneX},${fc.y} ${_laneX},${tc.y} ${tc.x},${tc.y}`;
    } else if(boxSelector===".c4-container-box"){
      // L2 cross-product: elongated S-curve — control points always extend INTO the gap (never back into modules)
      const _gap=tc.x-fc.x;
      const _sign=_gap>=0?1:-1;  // direction toward the gap
      const _pull=Math.abs(_gap)*0.42+(n%3-1)*65;
      _laneX=fc.x+_gap*0.5+(n%3-1)*50;
      const _cp1x=fc.x+_sign*_pull, _cp2x=tc.x-_sign*_pull;
      d=`M${fc.x},${fc.y} C${_cp1x},${fc.y} ${_cp2x},${tc.y} ${tc.x},${tc.y}`;
    } else if(boxSelector===".c4-component-box"){
      const _sameMod4=byId[fromId]?.module&&byId[fromId].module===byId[toId]?.module;
      // Same-product, same-column: use .external class (reliable)
      const _ispL3SameSide4 = !_sameMod4 && (()=>{
        const fc2=byId[fromId], tc2=byId[toId]; if(!fc2||!tc2) return false;
        const fmod=byId[fc2.module], tmod=byId[tc2.module];
        if(!fmod||!tmod||!fmod.product||!tmod.product) return false;
        if(topProdOf(fmod.product)!==topProdOf(tmod.product)) return false;
        const _fEl=canvas.querySelector(`.c4-component-box[data-id="${fromId}"]`);
        const _tEl=canvas.querySelector(`.c4-component-box[data-id="${toId}"]`);
        const _fExt=_fEl?_fEl.classList.contains("external"):false;
        const _tExt=_tEl?_tEl.classList.contains("external"):false;
        return _fExt===_tExt;
      })();
      if(_sameMod4){
        // Same module: compact arc outside the column
        const arcOff4=Math.max(50,Math.abs(tc.y-fc.y)*0.6)+(n%4)*20;
        _laneX=fc.x<natW*0.5?fc.x-arcOff4:fc.x+arcOff4;
        d=`M${fc.x},${fc.y} C${_laneX},${fc.y} ${_laneX},${tc.y} ${tc.x},${tc.y}`;
      } else if(_ispL3SameSide4){
        // Same product, same column: wider arc outside (left for internal, right for external)
        const arcOff4b=Math.max(100,Math.abs(tc.y-fc.y)*0.75)+(n%4)*30;
        const _fEl4=canvas.querySelector(`.c4-component-box[data-id="${fromId}"]`);
        const _isExt4=_fEl4?_fEl4.classList.contains("external"):false;
        _laneX=_isExt4?fc.x+arcOff4b:fc.x-arcOff4b;
        d=`M${fc.x},${fc.y} C${_laneX},${fc.y} ${_laneX},${tc.y} ${tc.x},${tc.y}`;
      } else {
        // Cross-column (selected ↔ dependency): S-curve through center gap
        const _gap4=tc.x-fc.x;
        const _sign4=_gap4>=0?1:-1;
        const _pull4=Math.max(30,Math.abs(_gap4)*0.42)+(n%3-1)*40;
        d=`M${fc.x},${fc.y} C${fc.x+_sign4*_pull4},${fc.y} ${tc.x-_sign4*_pull4},${tc.y} ${tc.x},${tc.y}`;
      }
    } else if(absDx>200 || boxSelector===".c4-system-box"){
      // Cross-column (large dx) OR L1 cross-column: route through center lane
      _laneX=(fc.x+tc.x)/2;
      d=`M${fc.x},${fc.y} C${_laneX},${fc.y} ${_laneX},${tc.y} ${tc.x},${tc.y}`;
    } else if(absDy<120){
      // Same boundary row (small dy, small dx): arc ABOVE the row to avoid intermediate boxes
      // L2: stagger arc heights so parallel arcs don't overlap
      _arcY=Math.min(fc.y,tc.y)-(boxSelector===".c4-container-box" ? 60+(n%4)*22 : 60);
      d=`M${fc.x},${fc.y} C${fc.x},${_arcY} ${tc.x},${_arcY} ${tc.x},${tc.y}`;
    } else {
      // Same column, different boundaries (large dy): route OUTSIDE the column
      const isLeft=(cen.frCx+cen.trCx)/2 < natW/2;
      const sideX=isLeft ? Math.min(cen.frCx,cen.trCx)-80 : Math.max(cen.frCx,cen.trCx)+80;
      d=`M${fc.x},${fc.y} C${sideX},${fc.y} ${sideX},${tc.y} ${tc.x},${tc.y}`;
    }
    const arrowId=`arrow-${svgSafeId(fromId)}-${svgSafeId(toId)}`;

    const hitPath=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","path");
    hitPath.setAttribute("d",d); hitPath.setAttribute("fill","none");
    hitPath.setAttribute("stroke","transparent"); hitPath.setAttribute("stroke-width","14");
    hitPath.setAttribute("pointer-events","stroke");
    hitPath.style.cursor="pointer";

    // Visible arrow path — no pointer events (passthrough to boxes)
    const path=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","path");
    path.setAttribute("id", arrowId);
    path.setAttribute("d", d);
    path.setAttribute("stroke", color);
    path.setAttribute("stroke-width","1.5");
    path.setAttribute("fill","none");
    path.setAttribute("stroke-opacity",".7");
    path.setAttribute("pointer-events","none");
    path.setAttribute("marker-end",`url(#c4ah-${color.replace("#","")})`);
    if(item._isBidi){
      ensureStartMarker(svg,color);
      path.setAttribute("marker-start",`url(#c4ahs-${color.replace("#","")})`);
    }
    ensureMarker(svg, color);
    path.dataset.from=fromId;
    path.dataset.to=toId;
    const pathTitle=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","title");
    pathTitle.textContent=`${byId[fromId]?.label||byId[fromId]?.code||fromId} → ${byId[toId]?.label||byId[toId]?.code||toId}`;
    path.appendChild(pathTitle);
    hitPath.addEventListener("click", (e)=>{ e.stopPropagation(); selectArrow(path, tipHtml); });
    svg.appendChild(hitPath);
    svg.appendChild(path);
    const lblG=buildArrowLabelGroup(d, item, fromId, toId, effCT, color);
    if(lblG) svg.appendChild(lblG);

  });
}

function ensureMarker(svg, color){
  const id=`c4ah-${color.replace("#","")}`;
  if(svg.querySelector(`#${id}`)) return;
  let defs=svg.querySelector("defs");
  if(!defs){defs=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","defs");svg.prepend(defs);}
  const marker=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","marker");
  marker.setAttribute("id",id);
  marker.setAttribute("viewBox","0 0 8 8");
  marker.setAttribute("refX","7"); marker.setAttribute("refY","4");
  marker.setAttribute("markerWidth","4"); marker.setAttribute("markerHeight","4");
  marker.setAttribute("orient","auto");
  const p=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","path");
  p.setAttribute("d","M0,0 L8,4 L0,8 Z"); p.setAttribute("fill",color);
  marker.appendChild(p); defs.appendChild(marker);
}
function ensureStartMarker(svg, color){
  const id=`c4ahs-${color.replace("#","")}`;
  if(svg.querySelector(`#${id}`)) return;
  let defs=svg.querySelector("defs");
  if(!defs){defs=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","defs");svg.prepend(defs);}
  const marker=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","marker");
  marker.setAttribute("id",id);
  marker.setAttribute("viewBox","0 0 8 8");
  marker.setAttribute("refX","1"); marker.setAttribute("refY","4");
  marker.setAttribute("markerWidth","4"); marker.setAttribute("markerHeight","4");
  marker.setAttribute("orient","auto");
  const p=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","path");
  p.setAttribute("d","M8,0 L0,4 L8,8 Z"); p.setAttribute("fill",color);
  marker.appendChild(p); defs.appendChild(marker);
}
function bezierMidFromD(d){
  const nums=d.replace(/[MC]/g," ").trim().split(/[\s,]+/).map(Number).filter(v=>!isNaN(v));
  if(nums.length<8) return {x:((nums[0]||0)+(nums[6]||nums[0]||0))/2, y:((nums[1]||0)+(nums[7]||nums[1]||0))/2};
  const [x0,y0,x1,y1,x2,y2,x3,y3]=nums;
  return {x:0.125*x0+0.375*x1+0.375*x2+0.125*x3, y:0.125*y0+0.375*y1+0.375*y2+0.125*y3};
}
function buildArrowLabelGroup(d, item, fromId, toId, effCT, color){
  const mid=bezierMidFromD(d); if(!mid) return null;
  // L1: no entity labels on arrows
  if(item._l1) return null;
  const isKafka=(effCT||"").toLowerCase().startsWith("kafka");
  const lines=[];
  // Helper functions available in all branches (must be in outer scope — block-scoped functions not available cross-branch)
  const _cleanSchema=s=>(s||"").replace(/TopicMessage$/,"").replace(/Message$/,"").replace(/Event$/,"");
  const _isValidEntity=s=>s && !s.includes("-") && s.length>1 && /[A-Z]/.test(s[0]);
  if(isKafka){
    const dir=(item.direction||"").toUpperCase();
    const icon=dir==="PRODUCE"||dir==="OUT"?"⬆":dir==="CONSUME"||dir==="IN"?"⬇":"⇅";
    let entName="";
    for(const src of [item.payloadSchema, item.schemaName]){
      const c=_cleanSchema(src);
      if(_isValidEntity(c)){ entName=c; break; }
    }
    if(!entName){
      function _lbKMeta(nid){
        if(!nid) return {};
        const n=byId[nid]; if(!n) return {};
        const cm=DATA.compMeta||{};
        const ks=[(n.htmlKey||"").toLowerCase(),(n.code||"").toLowerCase()].filter(Boolean);
        for(const k of ks) if(cm[k]) return cm[k];
        return {};
      }
      const tMeta=_lbKMeta(toId)||_lbKMeta(item.compTo)||{};
      const sMeta=_lbKMeta(fromId)||_lbKMeta(item.compFrom)||{};
      const allKTopics=[...(tMeta.kafkaTopics||[]),...(sMeta.kafkaTopics||[])];
      const matchedT=item.topicName?allKTopics.find(t=>t.topicName===item.topicName):allKTopics[0];
      const ps=_cleanSchema(matchedT?.payloadSchema||matchedT?.schemaName||"");
      if(_isValidEntity(ps)) entName=ps; // no fallback to topic name — skip if no real entity
    }
    if(entName) lines.push({t:`${icon} ${entName}`,k:"kafka"});
  } else if((effCT||"").toLowerCase()==="mixed" && (item._aggItems||[]).length){
    // "mixed" aggregated arrow: process each sub-dep individually
    const icon=item._isBidi?"↔":"→";
    const seen=new Set();
    (item._aggItems||[]).forEach(sub=>{
      const subCT=(sub.callType||sub.proto||"").toLowerCase();
      if(subCT.startsWith("kafka")){
        const dir2=(sub.direction||"").toUpperCase();
        const icon2=dir2==="PRODUCE"||dir2==="OUT"?"⬆":dir2==="CONSUME"||dir2==="IN"?"⬇":"⇅";
        const e2=_cleanSchema(sub.payloadSchema||sub.schemaName||"");
        if(_isValidEntity(e2)&&!seen.has(e2)){seen.add(e2);lines.push({t:`${icon2} ${e2}`,k:"kafka"});}
      } else {
        const e2=sub.payloadSchema||sub.schemaName||"";
        if(e2&&!e2.includes("-")&&!seen.has(e2)){seen.add(e2);lines.push({t:`${icon} ${e2.substring(0,22)}`,k:"rest"});}
      }
      if(lines.length>=5) return;
    });
  } else {
    const icon=item._isBidi?"↔":"→";
    const sn=(item.payloadSchema||item.schemaName||"");
    if(sn && !sn.includes("-")){
      lines.push({t:`${icon} ${sn.length>22?sn.substring(0,22)+"…":sn}`,k:"rest"});
    } else {
      // Try target/source node, then compTo/compFrom fallback (for L2 where ids are modules, not comps)
      function _lbFindMeta(nid){
        if(!nid) return {};
        const n=byId[nid]; if(!n) return {};
        const cm=DATA.compMeta||{};
        const ks=[(n.htmlKey||"").toLowerCase(),(n.code||"").toLowerCase()].filter(Boolean);
        for(const k of ks) if(cm[k]) return cm[k];
        return {};
      }
      const m=_lbFindMeta(toId)||_lbFindMeta(item.compTo)||{};
      const ms=_lbFindMeta(fromId)||_lbFindMeta(item.compFrom)||{};
      const eps=[...(m.endpoints||[]),...(ms.endpoints||[])];
      // Aggregate from allCompTo (L2 multi-target components)
      (item.allCompTo||[]).forEach(cid=>{
        if(typeof cid!=='string') return;
        const cm2=_lbFindMeta(cid);
        (cm2.endpoints||[]).forEach(ep=>{if(!eps.find(e=>e.m+"_"+e.p===ep.m+"_"+ep.p)) eps.push(ep);});
      });
      const seen=new Set();
      eps.forEach(ep=>{
        if(ep.resp){
          const r=ep.resp.replace("[]","").substring(0,22);
          if(!seen.has(r)){seen.add(r);lines.push({t:`${icon} ${r}`,k:"rest"});}
        }
        if(lines.length>=4) return;
      });
      // No fallback to (sync) — skip label if no real entity found
    }
  }
  if(!lines.length) return null;
  const LH=13, PAD=5;
  const boxH=lines.length*LH+PAD*2;
  const maxChars=Math.max(...lines.map(l=>l.t.length));
  const boxW=Math.min(160,Math.max(60,maxChars*6+PAD*2));
  const g=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","g");
  g.setAttribute("class","c4-arrow-lbl");
  g.style.display=c4ShowArrowLabels?"":"none";
  g.setAttribute("pointer-events","none");
  const rect=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","rect");
  rect.setAttribute("x",mid.x-boxW/2); rect.setAttribute("y",mid.y-boxH/2);
  rect.setAttribute("width",boxW); rect.setAttribute("height",boxH);
  rect.setAttribute("rx","4"); rect.setAttribute("fill","#ffffff");
  rect.setAttribute("stroke",color); rect.setAttribute("stroke-width","0.8");
  rect.setAttribute("stroke-opacity","1");
  g.appendChild(rect);
  lines.forEach((l,i)=>{
    const tx=document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","text");
    tx.setAttribute("x",mid.x-boxW/2+PAD+2);
    tx.setAttribute("y",mid.y-boxH/2+PAD+LH*(i+1)-2);
    tx.setAttribute("text-anchor","start");
    tx.setAttribute("font-size","11");
    tx.setAttribute("font-family","monospace");
    tx.setAttribute("fill",l.k==="kafka"?"#585aa3":"#0096c3");
    tx.textContent=l.t;
    g.appendChild(tx);
  });
  return g;
}
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function exportSvg(){
  const canvas = document.getElementById('c4-canvas');
  const arrowSvg = document.getElementById('c4-arrows-svg');
  const canvasRect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  const s = _vpScale || 1;
  const ns = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';

  const natW = parseFloat(arrowSvg.getAttribute('width'))  || canvasRect.width  / s;
  const natH = parseFloat(arrowSvg.getAttribute('height')) || canvasRect.height / s;

  const expSvg = document.createElementNS(ns, 'svg');
  expSvg.setAttribute('xmlns', ns);
  expSvg.setAttribute('width', natW);
  expSvg.setAttribute('height', natH);
  expSvg.setAttribute('viewBox', `0 0 ${natW} ${natH}`);

  const bg = document.createElementNS(ns, 'rect');
  bg.setAttribute('width', natW);
  bg.setAttribute('height', natH);
  bg.setAttribute('fill', getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--bg').trim() || '#f3f2f1');
  expSvg.appendChild(bg);

  const defs = arrowSvg.querySelector('defs');
  if(defs) expSvg.appendChild(defs.cloneNode(true));

  function addTitle(node, text){
    const title = document.createElementNS(ns, 'title');
    title.textContent = text;
    node.appendChild(title);
  }
  function addText(g, x, y, text, size, weight, fill, maxW){
    const words = (text||'').split(' ');
    let line = '', lineY = y;
    const lineH = size * 1.35;
    words.forEach(w => {
      const test = line ? line + ' ' + w : w;
      if(maxW && test.length * size * 0.55 > maxW && line){
        const t = document.createElementNS(ns, 'text');
        t.setAttribute('x', x); t.setAttribute('y', lineY);
        t.setAttribute('font-size', size); t.setAttribute('font-weight', weight||'normal');
        t.setAttribute('fill', fill); t.setAttribute('font-family', "'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif");
        t.textContent = line;
        g.appendChild(t); line = w; lineY += lineH;
      } else { line = test; }
    });
    if(line){
      const t = document.createElementNS(ns, 'text');
      t.setAttribute('x', x); t.setAttribute('y', lineY);
      t.setAttribute('font-size', size); t.setAttribute('font-weight', weight||'normal');
      t.setAttribute('fill', fill); t.setAttribute('font-family', "'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif");
      t.textContent = line;
      g.appendChild(t);
    }
  }

  const lvl = c4Level;
  const boxSel = lvl==='context' ? '.c4-system-box' :
                 lvl==='container' ? '.c4-container-box' : '.c4-component-box';

  if(lvl !== 'context'){
    [...canvas.querySelectorAll('.c4-boundary')].forEach(bnd => {
      const r = bnd.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = (r.left - canvasRect.left) / s;
      const y = (r.top  - canvasRect.top)  / s;
      const w = r.width / s, h = r.height / s;
      const cs = window.getComputedStyle(bnd);
      const boundaryId = bnd.dataset.boundaryId || bnd.querySelector('.c4-bnd-name')?.textContent?.trim() || 'boundary';
      const boundaryName = bnd.dataset.boundaryName || bnd.querySelector('.c4-bnd-name')?.textContent?.trim() || boundaryId;
      const g = document.createElementNS(ns, 'g');
      g.setAttribute('id', `boundary-${svgSafeId(boundaryId)}`);
      addTitle(g, boundaryName);

      const rect = document.createElementNS(ns, 'rect');
      rect.setAttribute('x', x); rect.setAttribute('y', y);
      rect.setAttribute('width', w); rect.setAttribute('height', h);
      rect.setAttribute('rx', '8'); rect.setAttribute('fill', 'none');
      rect.setAttribute('stroke', cs.borderTopColor || '#a19f9d');
      rect.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1.5');
      if((cs.borderTopStyle||cs.borderStyle||'').includes('dashed')) rect.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray','5,3');
      g.appendChild(rect);

      const hdr = bnd.querySelector('.c4-bnd-name');
      if(hdr){
        const t = document.createElementNS(ns, 'text');
        t.setAttribute('x', x+8); t.setAttribute('y', y+14);
        t.setAttribute('font-size', '11'); t.setAttribute('font-weight', '700');
        t.setAttribute('fill', cs.borderTopColor || '#1168bd');
        t.setAttribute('font-family', "'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif");
        t.textContent = hdr.textContent.trim();
        g.appendChild(t);
      }
      expSvg.appendChild(g);
    });
  }

  [...canvas.querySelectorAll(boxSel + '[data-id]')].forEach(box => {
    const r = box.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = (r.left - canvasRect.left) / s;
    const y = (r.top  - canvasRect.top)  / s;
    const w = r.width / s, h = r.height / s;
    const g = document.createElementNS(ns, 'g');
    const boxId = box.dataset.id || 'box';
    const boxName = box.querySelector('.c4-name')?.textContent?.trim() || boxId;
    g.setAttribute('id', `box-${svgSafeId(boxId)}`);
    addTitle(g, boxName);

    const rect = document.createElementNS(ns, 'rect');
    rect.setAttribute('x', x); rect.setAttribute('y', y);
    rect.setAttribute('width', w); rect.setAttribute('height', h);
    rect.setAttribute('rx', '6');
    const cs = window.getComputedStyle(box);
    rect.setAttribute('fill', (!cs.backgroundColor||cs.backgroundColor==='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)')?'#ffffff':cs.backgroundColor);
    rect.setAttribute('stroke', cs.borderTopColor || '#1168bd');
    rect.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1.5');
    g.appendChild(rect);

    let ty = y + 11;
    const tagEl  = box.querySelector('.c4-tag');
    const nameEl = box.querySelector('.c4-name');
    const footEl = box.querySelector('.c4-footer');
    if(tagEl){
      const tagColor = window.getComputedStyle(tagEl).color || 'rgba(17,104,189,0.6)';
      addText(g, x+7, ty, tagEl.textContent.trim(), 9, 'normal', tagColor, w-14);
      ty += 11;
    }
    if(nameEl){
      const nameColor = window.getComputedStyle(nameEl).color || '#1168bd';
      addText(g, x+7, ty, nameEl.textContent.trim(), 11, '700', nameColor, w-14);
      ty += 14;
    }
    if(footEl){
      const ft = footEl.textContent.trim().replace(/\s+/g,' ');
      addText(g, x+7, y+h-6, ft, 9, 'normal', '#a19f9d', w-14);
    }
    expSvg.appendChild(g);
  });

  [...arrowSvg.querySelectorAll('path[marker-end]')].forEach(path => {
    const clone = path.cloneNode(true);
    const fromId = clone.dataset.from || 'from';
    const toId = clone.dataset.to || 'to';
    clone.setAttribute('id', `arrow-${svgSafeId(fromId)}-${svgSafeId(toId)}`);
    addTitle(clone, `${byId[fromId]?.label||byId[fromId]?.code||fromId} → ${byId[toId]?.label||byId[toId]?.code||toId}`);
    expSvg.appendChild(clone);
  });

  const svgStr = new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(expSvg);
  const blob = new Blob([svgStr], {type:'image/svg+xml'});
  const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = `architecture-${lvl}-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}.svg`;
  document.body.appendChild(a); a.click();
  document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}


// Init stats bar with total counts
try {
  const topProds = DATA.products.filter(p=>!p.parent && hasModules(p.id) && p.code!=="na");
  const totalProd = topProds.length;
  const totalMod  = DATA.modules.length;
  const totalComp = DATA.components.length;
  const _el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
  if(_el("s-prod")) _el("s-prod").textContent = totalProd;
  if(_el("s-mod"))  _el("s-mod").textContent  = totalMod;
  if(_el("s-comp")) _el("s-comp").textContent = totalComp;
  if(_el("gen-date")) _el("gen-date").textContent = DATA.generated||"";
} catch(e) { console.warn("initStats:", e.message); }
try { buildSelectionTree(); } catch(e) { console.error('buildSelectionTree:', e); }
try { renderC4(); } catch(e) { console.error('renderC4:', e); }
(function(){
  // Collapse all expanded selection panels
  document.querySelectorAll('.sel-modules,.sel-subprod-mods').forEach(function(el){
    el.classList.remove('open');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('[id^="exp-"]').forEach(function(el){ el.textContent='▶'; });
  // Uncheck all checkboxes in selection panel
  document.querySelectorAll('.sel-mod-check,.sel-prod-check,.sel-subprod-check').forEach(function(cb){ cb.checked=false; });
  var sv=document.getElementById('solution-view');
  var mc=document.getElementById('main-content');
  if(sv) sv.style.display='flex';
  if(mc) mc.style.display='none';
})();

</script>


</body></html>
